14.9: Na wuno abharaarikiri awe no owuundi hano akuuza arakwiimeererya no okukubhuurira, ‘Omutigire wuno omweeya guyo yiikare.’ Hayo, oraaza kurora eziisoni bhukongʼu, kwo okubha oraswaagibhwa kugya kwiikara kumweeya gwo omuutu wi iyaasi bhukongʼu.
14.10: “Kweego, hano oraaraarikwe munyaangi, noogye wiikare kumweeya gwo omuutu wi iyaasi, kwo okubha hano wurya akuraarikiri akuuza, akubhuurire, ‘Omusaani waane, nawuuze embere hano, niho ahazomu bhukongʼu.’ Kweego niigo bharaakusuuke no orabha embere ya abhagini bhoosi.
14.11: Omuutu wuyo woosi wuno akwiigega omweene kubha omukuru, Taatabhugya aramwiikya iyaasi. Nawe omuutu wuyo woosi wuno akwiiyiikya, Taatabhugya aramutiirya kubha omukuru.”
14.12: Niho, Yeesu akamubhuurira wurya yamuginihirye, “Hano oraabhakorere abhaatu ebhyaakurya bhya mumwiisi hamwe engoroobha, otabharaarika abhasaani, naabhe bhawamweenyu, naabhe abhahiiri bhaazo, naabhe abhanyaroobho bhaazo, naabhe abhaniibhi bha mumugye gwaazo. Oraakore ego, neebho bhoosi bharakuraarika, na kweego orabha okyooreriibhwe amariho kugarya obhakoreeri.
14.13: “Nawe, hano oraabhakorere enyaangi, oraarike abhataka, abharema, amagata na abhahoku.
14.14: Niho oraabhone orubhaango, kwo okubha bhayo bhatana ekigiro kyo okukukyoorerya. Nawe, Taatabhugya niwe araakukyoorerye, kwiibhaga ryo okuryoora abhaatu bhe eheene.” Ekireengyo kye enyaangi yo obhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya (Mataayo 22:1-10)
14.15: Omugini owumwe wa bhano bhaari bhiikeeri neewe kwiigari, hano akiigwa amangʼana ga Yeesu, akamubhuurira, “Ano orubhaango, omuutu wowoosi wuno araarye enyaangi mubhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya!”
14.16: Nawe Yeesu akamukyoora, “Yaari ariho omuutu owumwe, wuno yakoriri enyaangi ekuru no okuraarika abhaatu bhaaru.
14.17: Hano enyaangi yahikiri, akaragania omugya waaye kubharaarika bhoosi, abhabhuurire, ‘Muuze, ebhigiro bhyoosi bhibheeri!’
14.18: “Nawe, abharaarikwa bhoosi bhakabha bharasabha okwaabhirwa. Wo obhutaangi akamubhuurira, ‘Niguriri omuguundu, ndeenderwa ngeende okugurora. Ndakusabha oniabhire.’
14.19: “Owuundi akabhuga, ‘Niguriri eziingʼoombe ikumi zyo okurimira, na bhoono nkugya niri kuzisakya, ndakusabha oniabhire.’
14.20: “No owuundi akabhuga, ‘Niho nakweera omukari, kweego nitakunagya kuuza.’
14.21: “Omugya wuyo akakyoora, akamubhuurira omukuru waaye gayo goosi. Niho omukuru wuyo akatiinda, akamubhuurira omuhokya waaye, ‘Noogye bhwaangu kunziinzira zya amaahukano na kuhizira hya mumugye guno, obhareete abhataka, abharema, amagata na abhahoku.’
14.22: “Kyaamwe, omugya wuyo akakyoora, akamubhuurira, ‘Omukuru, gano ondageenie nigakoriri, naabhe ego omweeya gukyaariho.’
14.23: “Omukuru akamubhuurira, ‘Ambe! Noogye igutu yo omugye, kuziinzira zo okugya muziiroobho suuhu na mumiguundu, obhakumiirirye abhaatu bhiize bhasikire mumugye gwaane, tee gwiizure.
14.24: Nawe, bharya bhoosi bhano naraarikiri kubhutaangi, atariho naabhe owumwe, wuno araroote enyaangi yaane!’ ” Obhurito bhwo okubha omwaanamweega wa Yeesu (Mataayo 10:37-38)
14.25: Yeesu ahaabha aratuniirirwa ne esaango ekuru ya abhaatu. Akiikibhuka, akabhabhuurira,
14.26: “Omuutu wowoosi wuno akuuza owaane atakunagya kubha omwaanamweega waane, eraabhe ataaniseegiri kukira wiise na nina, omukari na abhaana bhaaye, abhahiiri na abhasubhaati bhaaye, naabhe obhuhoru bhwaaye omweene.
14.27: No omuutu wowoosi wuno, akyaari kugega omusaraba gwaaye anituniirire, atakunagya kubha omwaanamweega waane.
14.28: “Tubhuge owumwe weenyu areenda okwoomboka etimu etaambi bhukongʼu. Eheene, atakwoomboka akyaari okwiikara, no okwiiseega obhuguri bhwe ebhigiro bhino aroombokere etimu yiyo? Kwo okukora ego, niho araamenye kubha ane eziimbirya zo okwiisa okumara kwoomboka.
14.29: Araatige okukora ego, aranagya akwoomboka obhurusa, nawe hasuuhwiigo atamwe okumariirya etimu. Niho abhahiti bharamuzibhura,
14.30: bharabhuga, ‘Omuutu wuno yataangiri okwoomboka, nawe ataanagirye okurimara eriikiindaasi riyo!’
14.31: “Niruusye ekireengyo ekiindi. Tubhuge abhatemi bhabhiri bhariibhanura okurwaana. Wo obhutaangi ana abhasirikare ebhikwe ikumi (10,000) ego, owuundi ebhikwe miroongo ebhiri (20,000). Wo obhutaangi atakunagya kugya mwiirwaana bhakyaari kwiikara no okwiiseega kyeego araanagye okurwaana na wuno ana abhasirikare ebhikwe miroongo ebhiri (20,000).
14.32: Araarore kubha aratamwa eriihi, arabhatuma abhabhagati bhaaye, bhagye bhwaangu kumutemi owuundi araabhe kure, bhiigwaane.
14.33: “Ambe, kweemwe atariho wuno araanagye kubha omwaanamweega waane, kweego akyaari kutiga ebhigiro bhyoosi bhino anabhyo. Mubhe no obhweera kyo omuunyu omuzomu (Mataayo 5:13; Mariko 9:50)
14.34: “Omuunyu ni muzomu, nawe guraabhe gusarikiri, gutakubha no obhuzoma bhwo omuunyu kweeki.
14.35: Omuunyu gwe etuubho yino, gutakweenderwa, naabhe kumarobha, naabhe kutuumo yo oruse, niho erataaswa kure. Wa amatwi, yiitegeerere kisi!”

15.1: Kwiibhaga riyo, abhatobhya bhe eriigooti na bhe ebhibhi, bhoosi bhahaaza ku Yeesu okubha bhamwiitegeerere.
15.2: Ekagirya Abhafarisayo na abheegya bhe emigiro bhakiiriririrya bhakubhuga, “Omuutu wuno, ndora arabhasuungʼaana bhe ebhibhi na kweeki ararya nabho!”
15.4: “Tubhuge owumwe weenyu ane eziingʼoondu igana rimwe (100). Araamenye kubha eyimwe ebhuriri, arakorabhwi? Arazitiga zirya miroongo keenda na keenda (99) mukiriisyo, no okugya kuikomya yirya ebhuriri, tee ayibhone.
15.5: Hano araayibhone, arayisesera kwiibhega kwo obhuzomererwa,
15.6: no okuyireeta mumugye. Hayo arabhabhirikira abhasaani na abhanyaroobho bhaaye no okubhabhuurira, ‘Tuzomererwe hamwe, kwo okubha engʼoondu yaane yino yabhuriri, niyibhweeni!’
15.7: “Ndabhabhuurira, niigo ego bhuraabhe obhuzomererwa bhwaaru mwiisaaro, hano we ebhibhi owumwe araate ebhibhi bhyaaye. Obhuzomererwa bhuyo bhurabha bhukuru kukira bhurya bhwa abhaatu abhazomu emiroongo keenda na keenda (99) bhano bhatana obhweendi bhwo okuta ebhibhi.” Obhuzomererwa bhwo okubhona orubhirya runo rwaabhuriri
15.8: Niho akabhabhuurira ekireengyo, akabhuga, “Tubhuge kubha, omukari owumwe ane eziidinaari ikumi, na araabhurye edinaari eyimwe. Atakwaakya etara no okutarikya enyuumba yoosi, ayikomye kwo omukya tee ayibhone?
15.9: Hano araayibhone, arabhirikira abhasaani na abhanyaroobho bhaaye no okubhabhuurira, ‘Tuzomererwe hamwe, kwo okubha orubhirya runo rwaabhuriri, nirubhweeni!’
15.10: “Ndabhabhuurira, niigo ego Taatabhugya akuzomererwa embere ya bhamaraika, hano we ebhibhi owumwe akuta ebhibhi bhyaaye.” Obhuzomererwa bhwo okukyoora kwo omuri we engabho
15.11: Yeesu akoongera okugaamba, “Yaariho omuutu owumwe, ahaabha na abhaana bhabhiri bhe ekisubhe.
15.12: Omusuuhu, akagya kuwiise akamubhuurira, ‘Taata, nihaane engabho yaane.’ Kyaamwe, wiise akabhatwaania abhaana bhabhiri obhuniibhi bhwaaye.
15.13: “Hano zyahitiri eziisiku suuhu, omusuuhu wurya akakumania ebhigiro bhyaaye bhyoosi, akagya orugeendo rwe ekyaaro kya kure. Hano yahikiri eyo, akataanga kusarya ebhigiro bhyaaye kwo obhutuumbaahu.
15.14: Hano yamariri bhyoosi, ekatuuka enzara haari kukyaaro kirya, woosi akabha araraambuka.
15.15: Kweego, akagya kumuutu wumwe wa mukyaaro kiyo, akamusabha amwiikiririrye abhe omuhokya waaye. Omuutu wuyo, akamutuma agye mumuguundu gwaaye okuriisya eziimbiizi.
15.16: Na hano eziimbiizi zaari kurya amakaanda, akabha ne enaamba yo okugarya omweene, nawe atariho omuutu wuno yamuheeri kiyo kyoosi kyo okurya.
15.17: “Hano yamariri, akahiituka, akiiseega kubha, ‘Abhabhagati bha taata, ndora bhoosi bhararya, tee bhariiguta no okusaagya! Nawe enye hano, ndakwa kwe enzara.
15.18: Ndakyoora kutaata no okumubhuurira, “Taata, nimukoreeri ebhibhi Taatabhugya na nikukoreeri naawe woosi.
15.19: Nitakweenderwa kweeki kubhirikirwa omwaana waazo. Kweego, onikore kyo owumwe wa abhabhagati bhaazo.” ’
15.20: “Kyaamwe, omumura wuyo akabhuuka hayo, akakyoora kuwiise. Na hano yaari akyaari kure ne enyuumba, wiise akamurora, akamurorera ebhigoongi bhukongʼu. Niho, akamuryaarira omwaana waaye, akamuhuumbata kwo obhuseegi.
15.21: Omwaana wuyo, akamubhuurira wiise, ‘Taata, nimukoreeri ebhibhi Taatabhugya na nikukoreeri naawe woosi. Nitakweenderwa kweeki kubhirikirwa omwaana waazo.’
15.22: “Nawe, wiise akabhabhuurira abhagya bhaaye, ‘Mureete bhwaangu engibho enzomu mumwiibhohye! Mumwiibhohye eseeri kukyaara kyaaye ne ebhikweera kumaguru.
15.23: Mureete emoori enuru yirya, mugwaage. Turye enyaangi kwo obhuzomererwa,
15.24: kwo okubha omwaana waane yaari abhuriri, nawe bhoono atuukiri! Ahaabha kya wuno akuuri, na bhoono ni muhoru kweeki!’ Niho bhayo bhoosi bhakataanga kukora enyaangi kwo obhuzomererwa.
15.25: “Eriibhaga riyo, omwaana waaye omukuru yaari mumuguundu. Hano yaari kukyoora no okwiisuka yiika, akiigwa omubhari na abhaatu bharabhina.
15.26: Akabhirikira omugya wumwe, akamubhuurya, ‘Mangʼanaki gari hayo?’
15.27: “Akamubhuurira, ‘Omusuuhu waazo yiiziri, na taata amugwaagiri emoori enuru yirya, kwo okubha amubhweeni omwaana waaye kweeki, ari muhoru.’
15.28: “Omwaana omukuru wuyo akatiinda, akaanga okusikira munyuumba. Wiise akahuruka habhoori, akabha aramwiisasaama asikire yiika.
15.29: Omwaana omukuru akamukyoora, ‘Itegeerera! Kumyaaka myaaru nikuhokeerye, na nikyaari kutiga okukwiitegeerera obhuswaagyo bhwaazo naabhe rumwe! Nawe enye, otaniheeri naabhe akabhuri, nigwaage nirye hamwe na abhasaani bhaane.
15.30: Nawe omwaana waazo wuno asarirye obhuniibhi bhwaazo kubhasiimbe, angu hano yiiziri, omugwaagiiri ewe emoori enuru!’
15.31: “Wiise akamubhuurira, ‘Omwaana waane, turiikara hamwe eziisiku zyoosi, ne ebhigiro bhyoosi bhino ninabhyo ni bhyaazo.
15.32: Nawe omusuuhu waazo, tweendiri tumukorere enyaangi no okuzomererwa hamwe, kwo okubha ahaabha abhuriri, nawe bhoono atuukiri, ahaabha kya wuno akuuri, nawe bhoono ni muhoru.’ ”

16.1: Yeesu akabhabhuurira abhaanabheega bhaaye, “Hahaabhaho omuniibhi owumwe no omwiimeerereri waaye. Omwiimeerereri wuyo, arasemwa kubha ahaasarya obhuniibhi bhwo omukuru waaye.
16.2: Kweego, omuniibhi akamubhirikira omwiimeerereri waaye, akabhuga, ‘Awe! Amabhi gano niigwiiri iguru yaazo, ni amangʼanaki gayo? Onierekye ekireengo kye ebhigiro bhyaane, kwo okubha otakunagya kweenderera kubha omwiimeerereri waane!’
16.3: “Omwiimeerereri wuyo akiibhuurya, ‘Nikorebhwi bhoono? Omukuru waane, anduusiirye mumirimo. Ntana amanaga go okurima, na ndarora eziisoni okusabhasabha.
16.4: Ambe! Nimenyiri ryo okukora, okubha hano ndaheebhwe emirimo, abhaatu bhanagye okuniginihya mumigye gyaabhu.’
16.5: “Kweego, omwiimeerereri akabhabhirikira abhaatu bhoosi bhano bhaari ne esiiri kumukuru waabhu, owumwe kwo owumwe. Akamubhuurya wo obhutaangi, ‘Esiiri yaazo kumukuru waane ni iriinge?’
16.6: “Akamukyoora, ‘Esiiri yaane ni mapipa igana (100) ga amaguta ge emizeituni.’ “Omwiimeerereri akabhuga, ‘Gega enyaarubha yino, ekaamirwe endihi yaazo. Ikara hano, oyikyoorye, ikaame miroongo etaano (50).’
16.7: “Niho akamubhuurya omusiiri wa kabhiri, ‘Awe, esiiri yaazo ni iriinge?’ “Akamukyoora, ‘Amagonera igana (100) ge engano.’ “Omwiimeerereri wurya akabhuga, ‘Gega enyaarubha yino ye esiiri yaazo, yikaame miroongo enaane (80).’
16.8: “Niho wurya omuniibhi akamukumya omwiimeerereri wuyo kwo obhungʼeeni bhwaaye, kwo okubha, abhaatu bhe ekyaaro kino bhana amangʼeeni go okwiikorera amangʼana gaabhu na abharikyaabhu, kukira abhaatu bho obhweero.
16.9: Enye ndabhabhuurira, mukorere obhuniibhi bhweenyu bhwa mukyaaro kino mwiibhonere abhasaani, kubha hano murahweerwe obhuniibhi, bhabhasuungʼaane mubhwiikari bhwa kirakeego.
16.10: “Omuutu wuno akubha omuheene kumangʼana amasuuhu, arabha omuheene kumakuru. Egoego, omuutu wuno atari omuheene kumangʼana amasuuhu, atari omuheene kumakuru.
16.11: Na eraabhe mutabheeri abhaheene kwo okuhokeerya obhuniibhi bhwe ekyaaro kino, ambe ni weewi wuno araabhiituruurire obhuniibhi bhwe eheene?
16.12: Na eraabhe mutabheeri abhaheene kwo okuhokeerya obhuniibhi bho owuundi, etakuturikana muhaabhwe ebhigiro bhyeenyu abheene!
16.13: Atariho omuutu wuno akunagya kuhokeerya abhakuru bhabhiri kwe eriibhaga rimwe. Yaangakoriri ego, aranagya okumubhiihirirya omukuru owumwe no okuseega owuundi, kasi kugwaatana no owumwe no okuzeera owuundi. Kweego na neemwe, mutakunagya okumuhokeerya Taatabhugya ne eziimbirya kwe eriibhaga rimwe!”
16.14: Hano Abhafarisayo bhakiigwa amangʼana gayo ga Yeesu, bhakataanga okumuseka kwo okuzeera, kwo okubha bhakaseega eziimbirya bhukongʼu.
16.15: Yeesu akabhabhuurira, “Emwe muriikora bhe eheene embere ya abhaatu, nawe Taatabhugya amenyiri amangʼana gano gari muziikoro zyeenyu. Obhuheene, amangʼana gano abhaatu bhakwiisigira bhukongʼu, garamutindya Taatabhugya. Ameegyo ge emigiro no obhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya (Mataayo 11:12-13, 5:31-32; Mariko 10:11-12)
16.16: “Emigiro gya Musa, na amakaamo ga abharooti, gaari gariitegeererwa na abhaatu tee ku Yohana. Okweema eriibhaga ryaaye, Amangʼana Amazomu go obhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya gaari gararwaazwa, na abhaatu bhoosi bhareenda bhiisikirye.
16.17: Nawe, ni kunyoohu bhukongʼu kwe eriisaaro ne ekyaaro okubhura, kukira orukaamo orusuuhu rwe emigiro okuruusibhwaho.
16.18: “Omuutu wuno akutaana na mukaaye no okumukweera owuundi, aramukorera obhuseebheeti. Neewe omukweeri wo omukari wuno ataaniri no omusubhe waaye, aseebheetiri.” Omuniibhi na Razaro
16.19: “Ahaabhaho omuniibhi wumwe, akiikara obhwiikari bhuzomu eziisiku zyoosi, no okwiibhoha emyeenda emizomu gye ezambaraau gyo obhuguri obhukuru.
16.20: Na mukiseku kyo omuniibhi wuyo, hahaabha no omutaka wumwe, eriina ryaaye Razaro. Razaro wuyo, omubhiri gwaaye gwoosi gukiizura amagaati,
16.21: na eziimbwa zaari ziraaza kumeesa amagaati gaaye. Hano amasaagyo gakugwa kurwa mwiigari ryo omuniibhi wuyo, Razaro akabha ane enaamba ahaabhwe, kwo okubha ahiigwa enzara.
16.22: “Kubhuteero, omutaka Razaro akakwa. Bhamaraika bhakamuhira mwiisaaro, haguhi na Aburahamu. Omuniibhi wurya woosi akakwa, akabhiikwa.
16.23: Na hano omuniibhi ahaabha aranyaaka bhukongʼu eyo nyaari, akagororokya ameeso, akarora Aburahamu kwa kure, na Razaro yaari haguhi neewe.
16.24: Akamubhirikira kwiiraka, ‘Taata Aburahamu, ondorere ebhigoongi, ndanyaaka bhukongʼu mumuriro guno! Omutume Razaro yiize kweenye, atobhye esoonga ye ekyaara mumaanzi, agantonyerye kururimi rwaane runyohe.’
16.25: “Nawe, Aburahamu akamukyoora, ‘Omwaana waane, ohiite kubha okabhona amangʼana amazomu mubhwiikari bhwaazo, na Razaro akabhona amabhi. Nawe bhoono, ewe aratoongerwa ekoro, na naawe oranyaaka bhukongʼu.
16.26: Hamwe na gayo, gati yeetu na neemwe, guterweho omwoobho omukuru bhukongʼu. Obhugazuro bhwo omwoobho ni kubha, bharya bhakweenda kurwa eno okugya oweenyu, bhatanagya okwaambuka, na bhano bhakweenda kurwa eyo okuuza oweetu, bhatanagya.’
16.27: “Omuniibhi wuyo akabhuga, ‘Ambe taata, ndakusabha omutume Razaro agye yiika kutaata,
16.28: abharekye abhahiiri bhaane bhataano, bhataaza kuuza eno kunyaako ehaari.’
16.29: “Nawe, Aburahamu akamukyoora, ‘Abhahiiri bhaazo bhana amangʼana gano gakaamirwe no omurooti Musa na abharooti abhaandi. Bhabhiitegeerere bhayo!’
16.30: “Akamukyoora, ‘Zeyi, taata Aburahamu! Nawe eraabhe omuutu arweere mubhaku abhagyeku, niho bhariikyoore no okuta ebhibhi bhyaabhu.’
16.31: “Aburahamu akamubhuurira, ‘Abhahiiri bhaazo bhayo, eraabhe bhatiitegeereeri gano gakaamirwe na Musa na abharooti, bhatakwiikirirya naabhe omuutu yaangaryokiri kurwa mubhaku.’ ”

17.1: Yeesu akabhabhuurira abhaanabheega bhaaye, “Ebhisigo bhino bhiraakore abhaatu bhakore ebhibhi, bhirabhaho kyoomeera. Nawe, araaza kurora omuutu wurya araagakore!
17.2: Yiingabheeri hakiriku kumuutu wuyo abhoherwe orubhwe mwiigoti no okurekerwa munyaanza, kukira amugirye owumwe wa abhasuuhu bhano akore ebhibhi.
17.3: Kweego, mwiiriihe mutaaza kukora ego! “Eraabhe, omuhiiri waazo araakusariirye, omuhiinye. Eraabhe araate ebhibhi bhyaaye, omwaabhire.
17.4: Na eraabhe araakusariirye muhuungati koosi kurusiku orumwe, na niigo araakyoore owaazo muhuungati kweeki abhuge, ‘Niteeri ebhibhi,’ omwaabhire.” Obhwiikirirya
17.5: Niho abheega bhayo bhakamubhuurira Omukuru Yeesu, “Turasabha otwoongereerye obhwiikirirya bhweetu!”
17.6: Akabhakyoora, “Nawe muungabheeri no obhwiikirirya bhusuuhu bhukongʼu kye etetere esuuhu bhukongʼu, muungabhuuriiri omuti gwo omuko guno, ‘Ihika weemibhwe munyaanza!’ nagwe guungabhitegeereeri. Emirimo gyo omugya
17.7: “Tubhuge owumwe weenyu ano omugya wuno akurima kasi arariisya eziingʼoondu. Omugya wuyo araakyoore mumugye, omukuru waaye we emirimo amubhuurire, ‘Awe okore bhwaangu, ikara hano orye ebhyaakurya’?
17.8: Zeyi! Amubhuurire, ‘Onikorere ebhyaakurya, na wiibhanure okunihokeerya tee, nimare kurya no okunywa. Niho awe orye no okunywa.’
17.9: Ambe, omugya araagakore gano omukuru waaye akamuragania, omukuru wuyo aramubhuurira ozomirye kwo okugakora? Zeyi!
17.10: “Niigo ego na neemwe, hano mwiigwiiri gano nibhabhuuriiri, mubhuge, ‘Twoosi ni bhagya ego. Tukoriri kyeego tukeenderwa kukora.’ ” Yeesu ahorirye abhageenge ikumi
17.11: Hano Yeesu yaari kugya Yerusaremu, akahita kumiimbi gatigati ye ebhyaaro bhya Samaria na Gariraaya.
17.12: Hano yaari akusikira mumugye gumwe, akasikana na abhageenge ikumi. Abhageenge bhayo bhakiimeerera kure neewe,
17.13: bhakatiirya eriiraka bharabhuga, “Omukuru Yeesu! Oturorere ebhigoongi, otuhorye!”
17.14: Yeesu akabharora, akabhabhuurira, “Mugeende mwiiyeerekye kubhaseengeri.” Bhakagya, na hano bhaari munzira, bhakahoribhwa.
17.15: Owumwe waabhu, hano yaruuzi kubha amariri kuhoribhwa, rugeendo rumwe akakyoora ku Yeesu, aramukumya Taatabhugya kwiiraka ikuru.
17.16: Hano yahikiri, akiitaasa bhubhuumari embere wa amaguru ga Yeesu, akamubhuurira, “Ozomirye.” Na omuutu wuyo, yaari Musamaria.
17.17: Yeesu akabhuga, “Ndora nikahorya abhaatu ikumi! Keenda bharya bhaari hayi?
17.18: Bhatariho bhano bhakyooriri kumukumya Taatabhugya, nawe ni mugya wuno omweene?”
17.19: Kyaamwe, Yeesu akamubhuurira, “Imeerera noogye owaazo, obhwiikirirya bhwaazo bhukuhonirye.” Okwiiriihya iguru yo obhutini bhwe ekiina bhuno bhukuuza (Mataayo 24:23-28, 37-41)
17.20: Orusiku rumwe, Abhafarisayo bhakamubhuurya Yeesu, “Obhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya, bhuraaza ryoori?” Yeesu akabhakyoora, “Obhuuzi bhwo obhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya, bhutari ekireengyo kino kikurorekana kwa ameeso.
17.21: Abhaatu bhatakunagya kubhuga, ‘Murore! Bhuri hano!’ kasi, ‘Murore! Bhuri harya!’ Mumenye kubha obhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya bhuri gati weenyu.”
17.22: Niho Yeesu akabhuurira abhaanabheega bhaaye, “Kuziisiku zino zikuuza, mune enaamba okurora naabhe orusiku rumwe runo enye Omwaana wo Omuutu, nikubha ndakaangata ekyaaro, nawe mutakururora.
17.23: Abhaatu bharabhabhuurira, ‘Murore! Wurya harya!’ kasi ‘Murore! Wuno hano!’ Nawe abhaatu bhayo, mutabharyaarira.
17.24: Gayo nibhabhuuriiri kwo okubha, enye Omwaana wo Omuutu ndaakyoore, ndaaza kyo orumesyo runo rukumesya mbaara zoosi ze eriisaaro.
17.25: Nawe, hano gakubha gakyaari kutuuka, niho enye Omwaana wo Omuutu nireenderwa nibhone enyaako bhukongʼu no okwaangwa na abhaatu bho orwiibhuro runo.
17.26: “Kyeego ehaabha kuziisiku zya Nuhu, niigo eraabhe kuziisiku zye enye Omwaana wo Omuutu.
17.27: Abhaatu bhaari bhararya no okunywa, bharakweera no okukweerwa, kuziisiku zya Nuhu, tee orusiku rurya Nuhu akasikira musafina. Hayo, omusabhuko gwe embura gukaaza, gukabhasikya bhayo bhoosi.
17.28: “Kyeego yaari kuziisiku zya Roti, niigo ego amangʼana garaabhe kuziisiku zye enye Omwaana wo Omuutu. Abhaatu bhaari bhararya no okunywa, bharagura no okusuruzya, bhararima no okwoomboka.
17.29: Nawe orusiku rurya hano Roti yarwiiri Sodoma, omuriro omuhaari gwe ekibhiriiti gukiika kurwa mwiisaaro, gukabhasikya bhayo bhoosi.
17.30: “Kweego niigo eraabhe orusiku runo enye Omwaana wo Omuutu ndaakuundukurwe.
17.31: Orusiku ruyo, omuutu wuyo woosi ari iguru kukisara, atasakya kwiika kugega ebhigiro bhyaaye munyuumba, aryaare. Na wuno akubha mumuguundu, ewe angʼose, atakyoora yiika kugega kyokyoosi.
17.32: Muhiite gano gaamubhweeni omukari wa Roti!
17.33: Omuutu wowoosi wuno akusakya okuriibha obhwiikari bhwaaye niwe araabhubhurye, no omuutu wuno araabhubhurye, niwe araabhutuurye.
17.34: “Ndabhabhuurira kubha, obhutiku bhuyo, abhaatu bhabhiri bharabha bhahiindiiri kubhuriri bhumwe, owumwe aragegwa no owuundi aratama.
17.35: Orusiku ruyo, abhakari bhabhiri bharabha bharasya hamwe, owumwe aragegwa no owuundi aratama. [
17.36: Kweeki abhasubhe bhabhiri, bharabha bharakora emirimo mumuguundu, owumwe aragegwa no owuundi aratama.]”
17.37: Abheega bhakamubhuurya, “Omukuru Yeesu, gayo garakorwa hayi?” Akabhakyoora, “Hano mukurora amatoonyi gariikumania ahagiro, muramenya kubha ekituundu kiri hayo, na niigo mukurora ekitiika kiyo mumenye kubha orusiku ruyo ruhikiri.”

18.1: Yeesu akabhabhuurira abhaanabheega bhaaye ekireengyo kino, kubheerekya kubha ereenderwa kumusabha Taatabhugya bhataaza kuniha.
18.2: Akabhabhuurira, “Kumugye gumwe, hahaabha no omutini we ekiina owumwe, ewe ataari kumwiigwa Taatabhugya, naabhe ataabhasuukiri abhaandi, naabhe ataabhamurirye abhaatu.
18.3: Na kumugye guyo, yaariho omutuumba owumwe. Neewe ahaabha aramugyaku omutini we ekiina ibhaga ryaaru kumwiisasaama, akamubhuurira, ‘Ndasabha oniimeererere kwe eheene gati waane no omubhisa waane.’
18.4: “Kwiibhaga itaambi, omutini we ekiina wuyo akaanga okumusakirya omutuumba. Nawe kubhuteero, akiigaambira mukoro yaaye, ‘Enye nitakumwiigwa Taatabhugya, naabhe nitakubhasuuka abhaandi, naabhe nitakumura omuutu wowoosi.
18.5: Nawe, kwo okubha omutuumba wuno araninyaakya bhukongʼu, bhoono ndamwiimeererera kwo obhuheene, okubha ateenderera okunirosya kwo okuniizaku!’ ”
18.6: Niho, Omukuru Yeesu akabhuga, “Tweege bhwaheene ekireengyo kyo omutini we ekiina omuzabhuri wuyo, naabhe ewe kubhuteero akatina ekiina bhwaheene.
18.7: Eraabhe niigo, erabhabhwi ku Taatabhugya, atakubhasakirya abhasorwa bhaaye bharya asoriri, bhano bhakumuririra obhutiku no omwiisi? Tubhuge kubha arakeezera kubhasakirya?
18.8: Ndabhabhuurira, arabhatinira bhwaangu ekiina kwe eheene. Nawe heene, hano enye Omwaana wo Omuutu ndaakyoore mukyaaro, ndabhona abhaatu bhakyaari no obhwiikirirya?” Ekireengyo kyo Omufarisayo no omutobhya we eriigooti
18.9: Kweeki Yeesu akaruusya ekireengyo kubhaatu abhaandi, bhano bhiiruuzi kubha nibho bhe eheene embere ya Taatabhugya, no okubhazeera abhaandi. Akabhuga,
18.10: “Abhaatu bhabhiri, bhakagya kusabha mwiiseengerero rya Taatabhugya. Owumwe yaari Omufarisayo, no owuundi yaari omutobhya we eriigooti.
18.11: “Omufarisayo wuyo akiimeerera, amusabhe Taatabhugya iguru wa amangʼana gaaye omweene, ‘Weyaa Taatabhugya, ndabhuga ozomirye, kwo okubha enye nitari omubhi kya abhaandi, abhasoohu, abhabheehi na abhaseebheeti, naabhe kyo omutobhya we eriigooti wuyo.
18.12: Ndiisiitya ebhyaakurya kabhiri kubhutuuro, na kuziimbirya zyaane zyoosi, ndakuruusirya yimwe yi ikumi ye ebhigiro bhyaane.’
18.13: “Nawe omutobhya we eriigooti wuyo, akiimeerera kure hasuuhu. Na ateendiri naabhe kugororokya ameeso gaaye mwiisaaro, niho akabha ariitematema mukikubha kyaaye kwe ebhigoongi, arabhuga, ‘Taatabhugya, ondorere ebhigoongi, enye ni we ebhibhi!’ ”
18.14: Niho Yeesu akoongera amangʼana gayo, “Ndabhabhuurira kubha, omutobhya we eriigooti wuyo akakyoora mumugye, akubharwa kubha we eheene embere wa Taatabhugya. Nawe owuundi ewe zeyi! Omuutu wuyo woosi wuno akwiigega omweene kubha omukuru, Taatabhugya aramwiikya iyaasi. Nawe omuutu wuyo woosi wuno akwiiyiikya, Taatabhugya aramutiirya kubha omukuru.” Yeesu arabhatweera ebhite abhaana abhasuuhu (Mataayo 19:13-15; Mariko 10:13-16)
18.15: Eriibhaga eriindi, abhaatu bhakamureetera Yeesu naabhe abhaana bhaabhu abhasuuhu, okubha abhatuurire amabhoko gaaye na abhatweere ebhite. Hano abhaanabheega bhaaye bhaakoriri ego, bhakataanga kubharekya abhiibhuri.
18.16: Nawe, Yeesu akabhabhirikira abhaana bhayo kweewe, akabhuga, “Mubhatige abhaana abhasuuhu bhiize kweenye! Mutabharekya, kwo okubha obhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya ni bhwa abhaatu kya abhaana abhasuuhu bhano.
18.17: Ndabhabhuurira obhuheene, wowoosi wuno atakwiikirirya obhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya kyo omwaana omusuuhu, atakunagya kubhusikira naabhe hasuuhu.” Ni kukongʼu kumuniibhi kusikira mubhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya (Mataayo 19:16-30; Mariko 10:17-31)
18.18: Omukaangati owumwe wa Abhayahudi, akamubhuurya Yeesu, “Omweegya omuzomu, nikorebhwi, niize nibhone obhuhoru bhwa kirakeego?”
18.19: Yeesu akamukyoora, “Kwaki orabhuga enye ni muzomu? Atariho omuutu muzomu, nawe Taatabhugya omweene ego.
18.20: Awe, omenyiri bhuzomu emigiro gya Taatabhugya, ‘Otaseebheeta, otiita, otiibha, otamenyeekererya orurimi, obhasuuke wuuso na nyoko weenyu.’ ”
18.21: Omukaangati akamukyoora, “Emigiro gino gyoosi, nigigwaatiri kweema obhwaana bhwaane.”
18.22: Hano Yeesu akiigwa gayo, akamubhuurira, “Oreenderwa okore engʼana yimwe ego. Noogye ogurye ebhigiro bhyoosi bhino onabhyo, ne eziimbirya zino oraabhone, obhatwaanire abhataka. Oribha okoriri ego, orabha wiituuriiri ehata mwiisaaro. Okumara, wuuze onituniirire.”
18.23: Hano omukaangati wuyo yiigwiiri gayo, akiitiimaata, kwo okubha yaari muniibhi bhukongʼu.
18.24: Hano Yeesu yamuruuzi yiitiimaatiri ego, akabhuga, “Erabha kukongʼu kumuniibhi kusikira mubhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya!
18.25: Ni kunyoohu kwe engamia okuhita mukibhaanga kyo orugera, kukira omuniibhi kusikira mubhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya.”
18.26: Abhaatu hano bhakiigwa gayo, bhakabhuga, “Bhoono, eraabhe niigo gari, weewi wuno akunagya kutuuribhwa?”
18.27: Yeesu akabhabhuurira, “Kubhaatu gatakuturikana, nawe ku Taatabhugya garaturikana.”
18.28: Niho, Petero akamubhuurira Yeesu, “Rora etwe, tumariri kutiga bhyoosi, tukakutuniirira!”
18.29: Yeesu akabhuga, “Ndabhabhuurira obhuheene, omuutu wuno atigiri enyuumba, hamwe omukari waaye, hamwe abhamura bhaabhu, hamwe abhiibhuri bhaaye, hamwe abhaana bhaaye, kwiiguru yo obhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya,
18.30: eheene arasuungʼaana maaru bhukongʼu kukira bhino akatiga, araabhe akyaari mukyaaro hano. Ne eriibhaga rino rikuuza, arasuungʼaana obhuhoru bhwa kirakeego.” Kweeki Yeesu arakeerenerya iguru yo okukwa no okuryooka kwaaye (Mataayo 20:17-19; Mariko 10:32-34)
18.31: Yeesu akakumania abhaanabheega bhaaye ikumi na bhabhiri kibhezo, akabhabhuurira, “Murore, bhoono tureerekera Yerusaremu, na eyo gano goosi abharooti bhaakaamiri iguru ye enye Omwaana wo Omuutu, garakuunaana.
18.32: Ndagazibhwa kubhaatu bhano bhatari Abhayahudi, bhano bharanizibhura no okunituka, bharanitweera amate.
18.33: Kweeki, bharanitema emijariti no okuniita, nawe orusiku rwa katatu, ndaryooka.”
18.34: Nawe amangʼana gano Yeesu yabhabhuuriiri abhaanabheega bhaaye, bhataamenyiri kwo okubha gaari gabhisirwe kweebho, neebho bhataamenyiri yaari arakeereneryaki. Yeesu aramuhorya omuhoku (Mataayo 20:29-34; Mariko 10:46-52)
18.35: Yeesu yaari ariisukira omugye gwa Yeriko, na orubhaara rwe enzira, yaari ariho omuhoku owumwe, ewe ahaabha yiikeeri arasabhasabha.
18.36: Hano akiigwa abhaatu bhaaru bharahita hayo, akabhuurya, “Niki kiriiyo?”
18.38: Rugeendo rumwe, akatiirya eriiraka, arabhuga, “Ee Yeesu, Omwaana wo omutemi Daudi, ondorere ebhigoongi!”
18.39: Abhaatu bhano bhamukaangatiri Yeesu bhaari bharamurekya kubha akire. Nawe ewe, akoongera akatiirya eriiraka akamubhirikira, “Omwaana wo omutemi Daudi, ondorere ebhigoongi!”
18.40: Hano Yeesu akiigwa eriiraka ryo omuhoku wuyo, akiimeerera, akaswaagya bhamureete kweenye. Hano omuhoku akiisuka, Yeesu akamubhuurya,
18.43: Rugeendo rumwe, akarora, akamutuniirira Yeesu, eno aramukumya Taatabhugya. Na abhaatu bhoosi, hano bhaakoriri gayo, bhakataanga okumukumya Taatabhugya.

19.1: Yeesu akasikira mumugye gwa Yeriko, akabha arahita gatigati yo omugye.
19.2: Mumugye guyo, yaari arimu omuniibhi wumwe, eriina ryaaye Zakayo, ewe yaari omukuru wa abhatobhya bhe eriigooti.
19.3: Yaari areenda kurora Yeesu ni muutu wa tuubhoki, nawe ataanagirye kumurora, kwo okubha esaango ya abhaatu yaari ni kuru, neewe ni muguhi.
19.4: Kweego akaryaara bhwaangu, akagya embere we esaango yiyo, akatiira kumuti gwo omuko, okubha anagye kumurora Yeesu akuhita kunzira yiyo.
19.5: Hano Yeesu yahikiri hayo, akiisuunza kumuti iguru, akabhuga, “Zakayo, ituuma bhwaangu! Nireenderwa nibhe omugini mumugye gwaazo reero.”
19.6: Rugeendo rumwe Zakayo akiituuma, akamuginihya Yeesu mumugye gwaaye kwo obhuzomererwa.
19.7: Abhaatu bhoosi, hano bhaaruuzi gayo, bhakataanga kwiiririirirya, bharabhuga, “Ndora agiiri kurya no omukori we ebhibhi!”
19.8: Nawe, Zakayo akiimeerera, akamubhuurira “Itegeerera, Omukuru Yeesu! Bhoono ego, eriitinika rye ebhigiro bhyaane ndabhaha abhataka. Na eraabhe nimuruusirye omuutu wowoosi, ndamukyoorerya kane.”
19.9: Yeesu akabhuga, “Reero yino, obhutuurya bhuhikiiri abhaatu bhe enyuumba yino. Omuutu wuyo woosi, bhoono ni we ekisyooko kya Aburahamu,
19.10: kwo okubha enye Omwaana wo Omuutu, niiziri kumoohya no okutuurya abhaatu bhano bhabhuriri.” Ekireengyo kya abhahokya bhano bhaaheerwe eziimbirya (Mataayo 25:14-30)
19.11: Hano abhaatu bhaari bhakwiitegeerera amangʼana gayo, Yeesu akeenderera kugaamba ekireengyo kimwe, kwo okubha yaari ariisukira Yerusaremu, na abhaatu bhayo bhakiiseega kubha, obhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya bhuratuuka kwiibhaga riyoriyo.
19.12: Kweego, akabhuga, “Yaari ariho omuutu owumwe we ekisyooko kyo obhutemi. Omuutu wuyo, akagya orugeendo kukyaaro kya kure, okubha ahaabhwe obhukaangati bhwo okubha omutemi, kyaamwe akyoore kukaangata ekyaaro kyaaye.
19.13: “Hano ya akyaari kugya, akabhabhirikira abhagya bhaaye ikumi gati wa abhaandi, akabhaha eziimiina ikumi, akabhabhuurira, ‘Mukore obhusuruzya bhwe eziimbirya zino tee hano ndaakyoore.’
19.14: “Nawe abhaatu bhe ekyaaro kyaaye bhakamubhiihirirya bhukongʼu. Bhakatuma abhaatu bhamutuniirire no okuhira amangʼana, bharabhuga ‘Tutakumweenda omuutu wuno abhe omutemi weetu!’
19.15: Nawe, akahaabhwa obhukaangati bhwo obhutemi. Hano yakyooriri, omutemi akabhabhirikira abhabhagati bharya akabhahaana eziimbirya, okubha omugya wowoosi amubhuurire omutemi abhweeni bhweeraki.
19.16: “Omugya wo obhutaangi akahika, akamubhuurira, ‘Omutemi, kuriingʼaana ne eziimbirya zino waantigiiri, nibhweeni obhweera bhwi ikumi kukiraho.’
19.17: “Omutemi wuyo akamubhuurira, ‘Okoriri kisi. Awe ni mugya muzomu! Kya bhurya waari omuheene kumahokya amasuuhu bhukongʼu, ndakuha obhukuru iguru ye emigye ikumi.’
19.18: “Omugya wa kabhiri woosi akahika, akamubhuurira, ‘Omutemi, kuriingʼaana ne eziimbirya zino waantigiiri, nibhweeni obhweera bhwi isaano kukiraho.’
19.19: “Omutemi akamubhuurira, ‘Woosi, ndakuha obhuturo iguru ye emigye etaano.’
19.20: “Omugya owuundi akahika, akabhuga, ‘Omutemi, eziimbirya zyaazo nzino hano, nikazibhisa kumweenda, zitaaza kubhura.
19.21: Nikakora ego kwo okubha ndakwoobhoha, awe ni muutu mukongʼu, oragega gano otaagateeriho, na oragesa gano oteemirye.’
19.22: “Omutemi akamubhuurira, ‘Omugya omubhi! Bhoono ndakutinira ekiina kumangʼana gaazo omweene. Ogaambiri omenyiri kubha enye ni muutu mukongʼu, ndagega garya nitaagateeriho, na ndagesa gano niteemirye?
19.23: Eraabhe niigo, bhoono kwaki otanibhiikiiri eziimbirya zyaane kubhasuruzya, okubha nizigege hamwe no obhweera bhwaku hano nikukyoora owaane?’
19.24: “Rugeendo rumwe, akabhabhuurira abhaatu bhano bhaari bhiimeereeri hayo, ‘Mugege eziimbirya zya wuyo, mumuhe wurya abhweeni obhweera bhwi ikumi.’
19.25: “Bhakamubhuurira, ‘Nawe omutemi, ndora wuno abhweeni obhweera bhwi ikumi!’
19.26: “Akabhuga, ‘Ndabhabhuurira kubha, omuutu wowoosi wuno akukorera emirimo ebhigiro bhino nimuheeri, ndamwoongerya ebhiindi. Nawe, omuutu wowoosi wuno atakukorera bhuzomu ebhigiro bhino nimuheeri, naabhe ebhisuuhu bhino anabhyo ndamuteesya.
19.27: Nawe abhabhisa bhaane bhano bhateendiri enye nibhe omutemi waabhu, mubhareete hano, mubhiite embere waane!’ ” Yeesu arasuungʼaanwa Yerusaremu kya Masiya (Mataayo 21:1-11; Mariko 11:1-11; Yohana 12:12-19)
19.28: Hano Yeesu yamariri kugaamba gayo, akeenderera no orugeendo rwaaye rwo okugya Yerusaremu.
19.29: Hano yiisukiri mumigye gya Betifage na Betania, mu Kiguru kye Emizeituni. Niho akabharagania bhabhiri gati wa abhaanabheega bhaaye,
19.30: akabhabhuurira, “Mugeende mumugye guno guri embere weenyu. Hano muraasikire muyo, murabhona etikiri, yino ekyaari kugega muutu, ebhohirwe. Muyisibhure muyireete hano.
19.31: Eraabhe omuutu wowoosi arabhabhuurya, ‘Ndora murayitazura?’ mumubhuurire, ‘Omukuru arayeenda.’ ”
19.32: Kimwe, abhaanabheega bhayo bhakagya, bhakabhona bhyoosi kyaabhurya Yeesu yabhabhuuriiri.
19.33: Hano bhaari bharatazura etikiri, bheene tikiri bhakabhabhuurya, “Emwe! Kwaki murasibhura etikiri yiyo?”
19.35: Bhakamuhirira Yeesu etikiri yirya, bhakaarya emyeenda gyaabhu iguru yaku, kimwe bhakamutiirya Yeesu iguru waku.
19.36: Hano Yeesu yaari aragya, abhaatu bhakaarya emyeenda gyaabhu kunzira kwo okumusuuka.
19.37: Na hano yiisukiri ahagiro he ekihiriingito kye Ekiguru kye Emizeituni, esaango yoosi ya abhaanabheega bhaaye bhakataanga kumukumya Taatabhugya kwo obhuzomererwa, iguru ye ebhitiika bhyoosi bhino bharuuzi. Bhakatiirya eriiraka ryaabhu,
19.38: bhakabha bharabhuga, “Atweerwe ebhite omutemi wuno akuuza kuriina ryo Omukuru! Habhe no omureembe gati wa Taatabhugya na abhaatu bhaaye! Turamukumya Taatabhugya wuno ari mwiisaaro!”
19.39: Kusaango yiyo, bhaabharimu Abhafarisayo. Neebho, bhakamubhuurira Yeesu, “Omweegya, obhatumanie abhaanabheega bhaazo bhatagaamba gayo!”
19.40: Yeesu akabhuga, “Ndabhabhuurira kubha, eraabhe bhano bharaakire, eheene amagina garatiirya eriiraka!” Yeesu araririra Yerusaremu
19.41: Hano Yeesu yiisukiri omugye gwa Yerusaremu no okugurora, akataanga okuguririra.
19.42: Akabhuga, “Niingeendiri reero yino kubha omenye enzira yo okureeta omureembe! Nawe bhoono otakunagya kumenya.
19.43: Kuziisiku zino zikuuza, abhabhisa bhaazo bharakwiinarirya enyiki kongʼu yo okukurwaania kurwa eziimbaara zoosi.
19.44: Kubhuteero, bharakusikya haasi awe na abhaatu bhaazo bhoosi. Ritariho eriigina rino riraasage iguru ye eriindi, kwo okubha hano Taatabhugya akakureetera obhutuurya, otaabhumenyeekereerye.” Yeesu araheebha abhasuruzya mwiiseengerero (Mataayo 21:12-17; Mariko 11:15-19; Yohana 2:13-22)
19.45: Kyaamwe, Yeesu akasikira mwiigoobhe rye eriiseengerero rya Taatabhugya, akabhabhona abhaatu bhano bhaari bhakugurya ebhigiro, akabhaheebha muyo.
19.46: Akabhabhuurira, “Ekaamirwe mumakaamo ga Taatabhugya, ‘Enyuumba yaane erabha enyuumba ya amasabhi.’ Nawe emwe, muyikoriri kubha eriibhigi rya abhateesya.”
19.47: Eziisiku zyoosi, Yeesu ahaabha areegya abhaatu mwiiseengerero. Abhakuru bha abhaseengeri hamwe na abheegya bhe emigiro na abhakaruka bha Abhayahudi, bhaari bharakomya enzira yo okumwiita.
19.48: Nawe bhataabhweeni omweeya kwo okubha abhaatu bhoosi bhaari bhariitegeerera amangʼana gaaye kwo obhwiitegeereri bhwaaru.

20.1: Orusiku rumwe Yeesu ahaabha mwiiseengerero rya Taatabhugya, areegya abhaatu na kubharwaazira Amangʼana Amazomu ga Taatabhugya. Niho abhakuru bha abhaseengeri, abheegya bhe emigiro na abhakaruka bha Abhayahudi bhakamuuzaku,
20.2: bhakamubhuurya, “Garya okoriri, oragakora kwo obhuturoki? Ni weewi akuheeri obhuturo bhuyo?”
20.3: Yeesu akabhakyoora, “Na neenye ndabhabhuurya eriingʼana rimwe. Mumbuurire,
20.4: obhuturo bhwa Yohana bhwo okubatiiza abhaatu bhukarwa ku Taatabhugya wuno ari mwiisaaro kasi kubhaatu?”
20.5: Hayo, bhaari bhariibhuurya abheene bharabhuga, “Turaabhuge, bhukarwa mwiisaaro, aratubhuurya, ‘Ambe! Ndora mutaamwiikiriirye?’
20.6: Na turaamukyoore kubha obhuturo bhwaaye bhurwiiri kubhaatu, ambe abhaatu bhoosi bharatutema amagina, kwo okubha bhariikirirya kubha Yohana yaari omurooti.”
20.7: Kweego, bhakamubhuurira, “Tutamenyiri obhuturo bhwaaye bhukarweera hayi.”
20.8: Yeesu akabhabhuurira, “Na neenye nitakubhabhuurira ni kwo obhuturoki ndakora gano.” Yeesu aratuubhania abhakaangati na abharimi abhabhi (Mataayo 21:33-46; Mariko 12:1-12)
20.9: Niho, Yeesu akabhabhuurira abhaatu ekireengyo kino. Akabhuga, “Yaari ariho omuutu wumwe, akeemya emizabibu mumuguundu gwaaye, akabhasagarya abharimi bhaguriibhe. Ewe, akagya orugeendo, akamara eyo eziisiku nzaru.
20.10: Eriibhaga ryo okugesa eziizabibu hano ryahikiri, akamutuma owumwe wa abhagya kubharimi bhaaye bharya, okubha bhamuhe esoondo yaaye ye eziizabibu okurwa mumuguundu gwaaye. Nawe, hano omugya yahikiri, abharimi bhayo bhakamutema, bhakamuheebha mabhoko bhusa.
20.11: “Mweene muguundu, akamutuma omugya owuundi. Nawe woosi bhakamutema no okumukorera obhubhi bhukongʼu, kyaamwe bhakamuheebha mabhoko bhusa.
20.12: Akamutuma omugya wa katatu. Wuyo woosi bhakamunyahaara, bhakamuheebha.
20.13: “Mubhuteero, mweene muguundu akabhuga, ‘Bhoono, nikorebhwi? Orugeendo runo, ndamutuma omwaana waane omuseegwa! Hamwe bharamusuuka ewe.’
20.14: “Nawe, hano abharimi bhaamuruuzi, bhakagaambana, ‘Wuno niwe omugabhi we ebhigiro bhya wiise. Tumwiite, engabho yaaye ebhe eyeetu.’
20.15: Kimwe, bhakamuruusya mumuguundu, bhakamwiita.” Niho Yeesu akabhabhuurya, “Bhoono, mweene muguundu wuyo arabhakorabhwi abharimi bhayo?
20.16: Araaze no okubhiita, no omuguundu guyo, arabhasagarya abhaandi!” Hano abhaatu bhakiigwa amangʼana gayo, bhakabhuga, “Gayo gatatuuka kweeki!”
20.17: Yeesu akabhamogorera, akabhabhuurya, “Bhoono mbe! Amakaamo gano gano obhugazuroki? ‘Eriigina rino abhoomboki bhaaryaangiri, niryo ribheeri eriigina eriikuru ryo obhurusa.’
20.18: “Ambe, omuutu wowoosi wuno akubha agweereeri eriigina riyo, arabhunika. Kweeki, omuutu wuno eriigina riyo riraamugweere, riramubhoondora bhukongʼu.”
20.19: Abheegya bhe emigiro bhayo na abhakuru bha abhaseengeri, bhakamenya kubha ekireengyo kino ni kwiiguru waabhu. Kweego bhakeenda kumumamira hayohayo, nawe bhakoobhoha esaango ya abhaatu. Omukoonyo iguru yo okumutiimbya Yeesu (Mataayo 22:15-22; Mariko 12:13-17)
20.20: Kweego abhakuru bha Abhayahudi, bhaari bharamwiisuunza Yeesu bhukongʼu, bhakatuma abhazuzuumi. Abhazuzuumi bhayo, bhakiikora kubha ni bhaatu bhe eheene. Nawe, bhaari ne ekeembo yo okumutega Yeesu kumangʼana gaaye, bhamugwaate no okumuhira kumwaanaangwa we Ekirooma, okubha azoongeerwe.
20.21: Kweego, abhazuzuumi bhakamubhuurya, “Ee Omweegya, tumenyiri kubha engʼana yino okugaamba no okweegya ni nzomu. Awe otakwaahura naabhe obhukuru bhwo omuutu, nawe oreegya enzira ya Taatabhugya kwo obhuheene.
20.22: Awee! Emigiro gya Musa giriikirirya, tumurihe Kaisari eriigooti, kasi tutamuriha?”
20.23: Rugeendo rumwe Yeesu akamenya omukoonyo gwaabhu, akabhabhuurira,
20.24: “Munierekye orubhirya rwe edinaari. Epicha yino ne eriina rino, ni bhya weewi?” Bhakamubhuurira, “Ni bhya Kaisari.”
20.25: Yeesu akabhabhuurira, “Ambe, bhya Kaisari, muhaane Kaisari. Na bhya Taatabhugya, muhaane Taatabhugya.”
20.26: Eriikyooro riyo rya Yeesu, rikabharuguurya bhukongʼu, bhakakira. Bhakatamwa okumutega kumangʼana gano akabhuga embere ya abhaatu. Amakaamo Amahoreeru gareerekya bhuriho obhuryoori bhwa abhaatu (Mataayo 22:23-33; Mariko 12:18-27)
20.27: Kweego Abhasadukayo abhaandi bhakaaza ku Yeesu. Abhasadukayo bhaheegya kubha, abhaku bhatakuryooka kweeki. Bhakamubhuurya Yeesu,
20.28: “Omweegya, Musa akatukaamira kubha, ‘Eraabhe omuutu akuuri na atigiri omukaaye akyaari kwiibhura, wamwaabhu amugabhe omutuumba wuyo, okubha amwiibhurire wamwaabhu omwaana.’
20.29: Tubhuge, bhaari bhariho abhahiiri muhuungati. Wo okutaanga akakweera omukari, akakwa akyaari kutiga omwaana.
20.30: Omusuuhu waaye wuyo wa kabhiri, [akamugabha omutuumba wuyo, woosi akakwa.]
20.31: Ekabha egoego ku wa katatu, woosi akamukweera, akakwa. Ekabha egoego kubhoosi muhuungati, bhakakweera omukari wuyowuyo, bhakakwa bhataatigiri mwaana.
20.33: Ambe otubhuurire, eraabhe obhuryoori bhurabhaho, omutuumba wuyo arabha omukari wawi? Bhoosi muhuungati bharya bhakamukweera no okumugabha.”
20.34: Yeesu akabhabhuurira, “Abhaatu bhe eriibhaga rino bhano bhakukweera no okukweerwa.
20.35: Nawe, bhano Taatabhugya abharuuzi bhareenderwa okuryoorwa mubhaku no okwiikara kukyaaro ekihya, bhayo bhatakukweera naabhe kukweerwa kweeki.
20.36: Na bhatakukwa kweeki, kwo okubha bharabha kya bhamaraika. Bharabha abhaana bha Taatabhugya, kwo okubha bhararyoorwa mubhaku.
20.37: “Naabhe Musa akazweenia abhaatu kubha abhaku bhararyoorwa. Mumakaamo gano akakaama iguru ye ekisaka kirya kino kyaari kwaaka omuriro, akabhuga Omukuru niwe ‘Taatabhugya wa Aburahamu, Isaaka na Yaakobo.’
20.38: Kweego, yiingabha abhatatu bhayo bhaari bhakuuri eziisiku nzaru, Taatabhugya akabhuga bhayo ni bhahoru kweewe! Kweego, abhaatu abhaku na abhahoru, bhoosi ni bhahoru mumeeso gaaye.”
20.39: Niho, abheegya bhe emigiro abhaandi bhakabhuga, “Omweegya, ogaambiri bhuzomu!”
20.40: Okutaanga eriibhaga riyo, bhaari bharoobhoha kumubhuurya Yeesu amabhuuryo agaandi. Masihi niwe we ekisyooko kya Daudi no Omukuru wa bhoosi (Mataayo 22:41-46; Mariko 12:35-37)
20.41: Nawe, Yeesu akabhabhuurya abheegya bhayo, “Kwaki abhaatu bharabhuga kubha, Masiya ni mwaana wo omutemi Daudi?
20.42: Daudi omweene, mukitabhu kya Zaburi, akabhuga, ‘Omukuru, Taatabhugya akamubhuurira Omukuru waane, “Wiikare orubhaara rwaane rwo obhuryo,
20.43: tee hano nikutuura abhabhisa bhaazo iyaasi wa amaguru gaazo.” ’
20.44: “Eraabhe Daudi aramubhirikira Masiya, ‘Omukuru,’ bhoono erabhabhwi Masiya abhe kweeki omwaana waaye?” Yeesu arabheegya abhaatu iguru ya abheegya bhe emigiro (Mataayo 23:1-36; Mariko 12:38-40; Ruuka 11:37-54)
20.45: Hano abhaatu bhe esaango bhaari bharamwiitegeerera, Yeesu akabhabhuurira abhaanabheega bhaaye,
20.46: “Mwiiriihe na abheegya bhe emigiro gya Musa. Bhano bhakuseega kugeenda kunzira bhiibhohiri emyeenda gyaabhu emitaambi, no okukeeribhwa kwo obhusuuku mumiteera. Kweeki, muziinyuumba zye eziisaango, bharaseega kwiikara kubhituumbi bhye embere. Ne eraabhe bhabharaarikiri muziinyaangi, bharaseega kwiikara hano abhagini bho obhusuuku bhakwiikara.
20.47: Bharabhateesya abhatuumba eziinyuumba zyaabhu. Na bhariiyeerekya kubhaatu kwo okusabha amasabhi mataambi bhukongʼu embere wa abhaatu. Murusiku rwo okutina ekiina, abhaatu bhayo bharabhona obhutemwa bhukuru okurwa ku Taatabhugya.”

21.1: Eriibhaga rino Yeesu yaari mwiiseengerero, akabharora abhaniibhi bharatuura ebhimweeso bhyaabhu muhuunguro ye ekimweeso.
21.2: Akamurora kweeki omutuumba owumwe omutaka arateemu amazeenzere abhiri ego.
21.3: Niho Yeesu akabhuga, “Ndabhabhuurira ge eheene kubha, omutuumba omutaka wuyo, atuuriri eziimbirya nzaru muhuunguro kukira bhoosi.
21.4: Bhoosi bhano bhatuuriri ebhimweeso bhisuuhu ego kubhyaaru bhye ebhigiro bhyaabhu. Nawe omutuumba wuno ni mutaka bhukongʼu, neewe atuuriri bhyoosi bhino yaari kwiisigira mubhwiikari bhwaaye.” Yeesu araroota okugwiisibhwa kwe eriiseengerero rya Taatabhugya (Mataayo 24:1-2; Mariko 13:1-2)
21.5: Abhaanabheega abhaandi, bhaari bharakeerenerya eriiseengerero, kyeego ekangʼatibhwa kwa amagina amazomu, hamwe ne ebhigiro bhyo obhuguri bhino abhaatu bhaamuruusiirye Taatabhugya. Nawe Yeesu akabhuga,
21.6: “Gayo goosi gano mukugarora, ziraaza eziisiku zino ritariho eriigina rino riraatame iguru we eriindi, goosi garagwiisibhwa!” Yeesu araroota iguru ye enyaako ya abhaanabheega bhaaye (Mataayo 24:3-14; Mariko 13:1-13)
21.7: Abhaanabheega bhayo bhakamubhuurya, “Omweegya, amangʼana gayo ni ryoori garaatuuke? Ne ekyeerekenioki kireerekye kubha, gayo gari haguhi kutuukira?”
21.8: Akabhabhuurira, “Mwiiriihe, omuutu wowoosi ataaza kubhangʼeena! Abhaatu bhaaru bharaaza bhakuhokeerya eriina ryaane, bharabhuga, ‘Enye neenye Masiya.’ Kweeki bharabhuga, ‘Eriibhaga ryo obhuteero, rihikiri!’ Abhaatu bhayo, bharangʼeena abhaatu bhaaru.
21.9: Na hano mukwiigwa amangʼana ge eriihi, ne ebhitiika bhya abhabhisa, mutoobhoha. Gareenderwa gayo goosi, gatuuke hiinga, nawe obhuteero bhwa goosi, bhukyaari.”
21.10: Yeesu akagaamba, “Ekyaaro kimwe kirarwaana ne ekiindi, no obhutemi obhumwe bhurarwaana no obhutemi obhuundi.
21.11: Harabhaho ebhirigito ebhikuru bhye esi, na ahagiro ahaandi harabha ne enzara ehaari, na amarweeri amabhi bhukongʼu. Na kiraaza ekyeerekenio ekikuru kurwa mwiisaaro, na abhaatu bhararora ebhisigo bhyo okubhobhohya bhukongʼu.
21.12: “Nawe, hano gayo goosi gakyaari kutuuka, abhaatu bharabhagwaata emwe no okubhahira muziinyuumba zye eziisaango, no okubhabhoha munyuumba ya abhabhohwa, bharabhanyaakya. Na murahirwa embere ya abhatemi na abhaanaangwa, kwo okubha emwe ni abhaanabheega bhaane.
21.13: Niigo ego muraabhone omweeya gwo okunigaambira.
21.14: “Kweego, mwaamure muziikoro zyeenyu, okubha mutige okunyaaka murakyoorabhwi hano ekiina kyeenyu kikubha kikyaari okugaambwa.
21.15: Enye omweene, ndabhaha amangʼeeni na amangʼana gano muraagaambe, tee abhabhisa bheenyu bhatakunagya kwaanga naabhe okubhahakania.
21.16: “Eriibhaga riyo ryo okuruusibhwa kwa abhakaangati, murariibhwa omukoonyo na abhiibhuri bheenyu, abhahiiri bheenyu, abhaatu bho orugaanda rweenyu, na abhasaani bheenyu. Bharakora abhaandi bheenyu bhariitwa.
21.17: Abhaatu bhoosi bharabhabhiihirirya kwe ekigirye kyo okubha emwe ni bhaanabheega bhaane.
21.18: Nawe, rutakubhura naabhe oruzweeri orumwe kumitwe gyeenyu!
21.19: No omuutu wowoosi wuno araagumire tee obhuteero niwe araatuuribhwe. Yeesu araroota kubha Yerusaremu erasikibhwa (Mataayo 24:15-21; Mariko 13:14-19)
21.20: “Hano muraarore kubha omugye gwa Yerusaremu gwiinaarirwe na abhasirikare bhe eriihi, niho muraamenye kubha eriibhaga ryo obhusarya rihikiri.
21.21: Eriibhaga riyo, bhano bhakwiikara mukyaaro kya Yudea, bhangʼosere mubhiguru, na bhano bhakubha mumugye gwa Yerusaremu, bharwemu bhwaangu, na bhano bhakubha mumiguundu, bhatakyoora mumugye muyo.
21.22: Bhararyaara, kwo okubha eziisiku ziyo ni siku zye enyaako, okubha amangʼana goosi gano gakaamirwe gakuunaane
21.23: Turabharorera ebhigoongi, abhakari bhano bharitohiri na bhano bhakukookya muziisiku ziyo! Erabha bhubhi, kwo okubha, mukyaaro muyo, harabha ne enyaako ehaari bhukongʼu, kweeki obhutemwa okurwa ku Taatabhugya bhuraaza kubhaatu.
21.24: Abhaatu abhaandi, bhariitwa kwa nyaambato, na abhaandi, bharagwaatwa no okubha abhabhohwa no okuhirwa mubhyaaro ebhiindi bhyoosi. No omugye gwa Yerusaremu ogweene, guratazwa na abhaatu bhe ebhyaaro ebhiindi bhano bhatari Abhayahudi, tee eziisiku zyaabhu zisire. Omwaana wo Omuutu araaza kutuurya abhaatu bhaaye (Mataayo 24:29-31; Mariko 13:24-27)
21.25: “Erabha ekyeerekenio kuryoobha, omweeri ne eziinzota. Na mukyaaro hano, eziinyaanza zirabha na amabhooka maaru, ziraruma, na kuteemo yiyo, abhaatu bhe ebhyaaro bharabha ne ehaha ne enyaako.
21.26: Gayo goosi, hano gakuuza kukyaaro, abhaatu bharoobhoha bhukongʼu. Bharakwa eziikoro kwo okukaangwa, bharaganya okubhonwa na amangʼana amabhi mukyaaro, kwo okubha Taatabhugya arabhisiingisya ebhigiro bhyoosi bhya mwiisaaro.
21.27: “Niho, abhaatu bhoosi bharaandore Omwaana wo Omuutu, nikuuza mumasaaro kwo obhuturo bhwaaru no obhuguungo.
21.28: Gayo goosi, hano garaataange okukorwa, mwiimeerere tiri, kwo okubha eriibhaga ryo okutuuribhwa kweenyu, riri haguhi!” Ekireengyo kyo okwiisuka kwo obhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya (Mataayo 24:32-35; Mariko 13:28-31)
21.29: Kweeki, Yeesu akabhabhuurira abhaanabheega bhaaye ekireengyo, arabhuga, “Mwiiseege omuti gwo omutiini, ne emiti egiindi gyoosi.
21.30: Hano muraarore gitaangiri okusibhuka amatu, hayohayo muramenya kubha eriibhaga rya amaahu riisukiri.
21.31: “Egoego na neemwe, hano muraarore gayo gataangiri kukorwa, niho muraamenye kubha obhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya bhwiisukiri.
21.32: Ndabhabhuurira obhuheene, orwiibhuro runo rutakuhita, tee gano goosi garaamarwe kukorwa.
21.33: Eriisaaro ne ekyaaro bhirahweerera, nawe amangʼana gaane gatakuhweerera na rumwe! Mubhe meeso
21.34: “Mwiiriihe, mutaaza kuhizwa na amangʼana amabhi ne ebhigiro bhye ekyaaro, no obhunywi, ne ehaha yo obhwiikari. Eraabhe mutiiriihiri, orusiku rwo obhuteero rurabha kituukiro no okubhakaanga.
21.35: Orusiku ruyo, rurabha kituukiro mukyaaro kyoosi.
21.36: Kweego, mubhe meeso eriibhaga ryoosi! Mugeenderere kumusabha Taatabhugya, okubha mutuuribhwe mugoosi gano garaatuuke, no okwiimeerera embere ya Omwaana wo Omuutu.”
21.37: Kuziisiku ziyo, mumwiisi Yeesu ahaabha areegya abhaatu mwiigoobhe rye eriiseengerero, nawe obhutiku ahaabha aragya mukiguru kino kikubhirikirwa Ekiguru kye Emizeituni.
21.38: Eziisiku zyoosi, abhaatu bhoosi bhahaabhuuka etabhoori zuri, no okwiikumanirya mwiiseengerero bhamwiitegeerere.

22.1: Yaari yiisukiri, Enyaangi ye Emikaate Gino Gitana Ekibhwiisya, yino ekabhirikirwa Enyaangi yo Okuhiita.
22.2: Abhakuru bha abhaseengeri, hamwe na abheegya bhe emigiro gya Musa, bhaari bharamoohya enzira yo okumwiita Yeesu, nawe bhaari bharoobhoha abhaatu.
22.3: Niho, Seetaani akamusikira Yuuda, wuno ahaabhirikirwa Isikariyoti, owumwe wa abhaanabheega bha Yeesu ikumi na bhabhiri.
22.4: Kyaamwe, Yuuda akagya kubhakuru bha abhaseengeri na kubhakuru bha abhariibhi bhe eriiseengerero, bhakakeerenia nabho kyeego araamuruusye Yeesu kweebho.
22.5: Kumangʼana gayo bhakazomererwa bhukongʼu, bhakiikirirya kumuha eziimbirya.
22.6: Yuuda akiikirirya, akataanga kumoohya omweeya gwo okumurya omukoonyo Yeesu, kwiibhaga rino abhaatu bhaaru bhatari bhariho. Yeesu na abhaanabheega bhaaye bhararya Enyaangi yo Okuhiita (Mataayo 26:17-25; Mariko 14:12-21; Yohana 13:21-30)
22.7: Orusiku rwe Enyaangi ye Emikaate Gino Gitana Ekibhwiisya rukahika, eheenderwa engʼoondu ye Enyaangi yo Okuhiita egwaagwe.
22.8: Niho, Yeesu akabhatuma Petero na Yohana, akabhabhuurira, “Mugye mutubhanurire ebhyaakurya bhye Enyaangi yo Okuhiita tuuze turye hamwe.”
22.10: Akabhakyoora, “Mugeende mumugye. Muraasikane no omusubhe wumwe wuno agegiri eseengo ya amaanzi, mumutuniirire eno akugya.
22.11: Munyuumba yino araasikire, mugye mumubhuurire mweene nyuumba, ‘Omweegya arasabha otweerekye hano araariire ebhyaakurya bhye Enyaangi yo Okuhiita hamwe na abhaanabheega bhaaye.’
22.12: Niho mweene nyuumba araabheerekye ekyuumba ekikuru mukinazo, kimariri kubhanurwa. Mutubhanurire muyo, turiire ebhyaakurya bhye Enyaangi yo Okuhiita.”
22.13: Abhaanabheega bhabhiri bhayo, hano bhakiigwa gayo, bhakarwa hayo, bhakagya. Bhakabhona goosi kyeego Yeesu yabhabhuuriiri, bhakabhanura ebhyaakurya bhye Enyaangi yo Okuhiita. Ebhyaakurya bhyo Omukuru (Mataayo 26:26-30; Mariko 14:22-26; 1 Abhakoriinto 11:23-25)
22.14: Hano eriibhaga ryo okurya ryahikiri, Yeesu akiikara kubhyaakurya hamwe na abhaanabheega bhaaye.
22.15: Akabhabhuurira, “Bhoono niigoombiri bhukongʼu okurya ebhyaakurya bhye Enyaangi yo Okuhiita hamwe neemwe nikyaari kunyaakibhwa.
22.16: Ndabhabhuurira kubha, nitakurya kweeki ebhyaakurya bhino, tee obhugazuro bhwe Enyaangi yo Okuhiita bhurakuunaanibhwe, no okweerekenia mubhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya.”
22.17: Kyaamwe Yeesu akagega ekikoombe kya amaanzi go omuzabibu, akabhuga, “Ozomirye, Taatabhugya.” Niho akabhaha abhaanabheega bhaaye, arabhuga, “Mugege ekikoombe kino, munywe.
22.18: Ndabhabhuurira kubha nitakunywa kweeki amaanzi go omuzabibu, tee obhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya bhuuze.”
22.19: Yeesu akagega omukaate, akabhuga, “Ozomirye, Taatabhugya.” Akagubhega, akabhaha abhaanabheega bhaaye, arabhabhuurira, [“Murye, guno nigwo omubhiri gwaane, na guraruusibhwa kwiiguru yeenyu. Mubhe murakora ego, kwo okunihiita enye.”
22.20: Na hano bhaamariri kurya ebhyaakurya bhye engoroobha, Yeesu akagega amaanzi go omuzabibu gayo, akabhuga, “Amaanzi go omuzabibu gano gariimeererera eriiragano eriihya rino Taatabhugya akukora, kuhitira amanyiinga gaane.]
22.21: “Nawe murore! Owumwe weenyu aranirya omukoonyo, na wuno akunirya omukoonyo tunawe mwiigari hano.
22.22: Enye Omwaana wo Omuutu, ndagya kwiitwa, kyeego Taatabhugya ahaabha yeendiri. Nawe, araaza kurora omuutu wuno araanirye omukoonyo enye Omwaana wo Omuutu.”
22.23: Niho, abhaanabheega bha Yeesu bhakataanga kwiibhuurya, “Ni weewi gati weetu araakore gayo?” Ameegyo iguru yo obhukaangati
22.24: Niho kweeki, eriiyoge rikarweera gati wa abhaanabheega bha Yeesu, kubha ni weewi gati yaabhu araabhe omukuru kukira abhaandi.
22.25: Yeesu akabhabhuurira, “Abhatemi bha abhaatu bhano bhatari Abhayahudi, bharabhaaha kwa amanaga, no okwiikumya kubha ni bhahaani.
22.26: “Nawe etakubha ego kweemwe, wuno akubha omukuru gati weenyu, abhe kyo omusuuhu. Na wuno akubha omukaangati, abhe kyo omubhagati wa abhaandi.
22.27: Kweego! Ni weewi omukuru wo okubhakira? Ni wurya akwiikara kubhyaakurya, kasi ni wuno akuhokya ebhyaakurya? Atari wurya akwiikara kubhyaakurya? Kweego, enye neenye niri gati yeenyu kyo omuhokya.
22.28: “Neemwe abheene ego, mukiikara no okusaaga neenye, hano niari munyaako.
22.29: Kweego, ndabhatuurira obhunagya bhwo obhutemi, kyaabhurya Taata waane yantuuriri enye.
22.30: Ndabhaha obhuturo bhuyo kwo okwiikara hamwe na neenye mubhe murarya no okunywa hamwe mubhutemi bhwaane. Muriikara kubhituumbi bhyo obhutemi ikumi na bhibhiri eno murabhaaha ebhisyooko ikumi na bhibhiri bhya Iziraeri.” Yeesu araroota kubha Simooni Petero aramwaanga (Mataayo 26:31-35; Mariko 14:27-31; Yohana 13:36-38)
22.31: Yeesu akabhuga, “Simooni, Simooni! Rora, Seetaani arabhasakya emwe kyo omuseesi wo okuseesa engano.
22.32: Nawe, nikusabhiiri ku Taatabhugya, obhwiikirirya bhwaazo bhutasuuha. Naawe hano oraakyoore, osakirye abharikyaazo.”
22.33: Simooni akamukyoora, “Ee Omukuru, enye nibheeri wo okugya kubhohwa hamwe naawe mukibhoho, naabhe kwiitwa, enye noosi ndiitwa!”
22.34: Yeesu akamukyoora, “Ee Petero, ndakubhuurira kubha reero ekorokoome ekyaari kugaamba, orabha omariri kunianga katatu koosi kwo okwiikora otanimenyiri.” Eriibhaga ryo okusikira mubhubhi
22.35: Kyaamwe, Yeesu akabhuurya abhaanabheega bhaaye, “Hano niabhatumiri mutaari ne ekiguzi kye eziimbirya, mutaari ne esakwa, mutaari ne ebhikweera, mukasuuhirwa na kigiro?” Bhakamukyoora, “Zeyi.”
22.36: Yeesu akabhabhuurira, “Kweema bhoono, eraabhe omuutu ane ekiguzi kye eziimbirya na ane esakwa, agege. Na wuno atana nyaambato, agurye ekabhuuti yaaye, agure nyaambato yimwe.
22.37: Mukore ego, kwo okubha amangʼana gano gakaamirwe na abharooti iguru waane, gari haguhi kubha no obhuteero bhwaaye. Kweego ekaamirwe, ‘Akabharwa hamwe na abhatemya bhe ebhibhi.’ Ndabhabhuurira kubha, ereenderwa gayo gakorwe kweenye.”
22.38: Nabho bhakamubhuurira, “Ee Omukuru, rora! Hano ziriho eziinyaambato ibhiri.” Neewe akabhuga, “Gano giisiri.” Yeesu aramusabha Taatabhugya mumuguundu gwa Getisemane (Mataayo 26:36-46; Mariko 14:32-42)
22.39: Niho Yeesu akarwa hayo, akagya kukiguru kino kyaari kubhirikirwa Ekiguru kye Emizeituni, kyeego yaari teemo yaaye na abhaanabheega bhaaye nabho bhakabha bharamutuniirira.
22.40: Na hano yahikiri kukiguru kiyo, akabhabhuurira, “Musabhe Taatabhugya okubha mutaaza kusakibhwa.”
22.41: Niho, akiibheza akiisuka embere hasuuhu, obhweema bhwo okutaasa eriigina, akatema haasi ebhiru, akasabha,
22.42: “Ee Taata, eraabhe ni bhuseegi bhwaazo, ndakusabha onduusiryeho eziinyaako zino. Nawe etabha kyeego enye nikweenda, nawe kyeego awe okweenda.” [
22.43: Niho, maraika kurwa mwiisaaro akamuhwaarukira Yeesu, akamuha amanaga.
22.44: Yeesu akabha no obhururu bhuhaari bhukongʼu, bhukamukora yoongere kusabha. Ekigeri kyaaye kyatuubheeni na amanyiinga, kikabha kiratonya haasi toi, toi.]
22.45: Na hano yamariri kusabha, akiimeerera, akabhakyoorera abhaanabheega bhaaye, akabhabhona bhahiindiiri kwo okubha bhaari bharosiri kwe ebhigoongi.
22.46: Akabhabhuurya, “Kwaki muhiindiiri? Mubhuuke! Musabhe Taatabhugya, okubha mutaaza kusakibhwa.” Yeesu aragwaatwa (Mataayo 26:47-56; Mariko 14:43-50; Yohana 18:3-11)
22.47: Hano Yeesu yaari akyagaamba gayo, akiizirwa na abhaatu bhaaru. Abhaatu bhayo, bhakakaangatibhwa na Yuuda, owumwe wa abhaanabheega bhaaye ikumi na bhabhiri. Niho, Yuuda akamwiisukira Yeesu, amukeerye kwo okumuhuumbata.
22.48: Yeesu akamubhuurya, “Yuuda, heene oranikeerya kwo okunihuumbata kyo omusaani, eno oranikorera omukoonyo kwo okuniruusya enye Omwaana wo Omuutu?”
22.49: Hano abhaanabheega bha Yeesu bhayo bhaaruuzi kyeego eraabhe, bhakamubhuurya, “Ee Omukuru! Tubhangʼerengʼere kwa nyaambato?”
22.50: Niho, owumwe wa abhaanabheega akamutema no okumutina okutwi kwo obhuryo omugya wo omuseengeri omukuru.
22.51: Yeesu akabhuga, “Mutige! Giisiri.” Akagwaata okutwi kwo omugya wuyo, akamuhorya.
22.52: Yeesu akabhabhuurya abhakuru bha abhaseengeri, abhakuru bha abhariibhi bha mwiiseengerero, hamwe na abhakaruka bha Abhayahudi bhano bhakaaza kumugwaata, “Mbe, mwiiziri ne eziinyaambato ne eziinduguzo okunigwaata kyo omuteesya?
22.53: Eziisiku zyoosi niari hamwe neemwe, ndeegya mwiiseengerero rya Taatabhugya, na mutaangwaatiri. Nawe bhoono, eriibhaga rino ni ryeenyu na ryo obhukaangati bhwa Seetaani.” Petero aramwaanga Yeesu (Mataayo 26:57-58; Mariko 14:53-54, 66-72; Yohana 18:12-18, 25-27)
22.54: Abhaatu bhayo bhakamugwaata Yeesu, bhakamuhira tee munyuumba yo omuseengeri omukuru. Petero akabha aramutuniirira kwa kure.
22.55: Hano bhaahikiri gatigati yo omugye, omuriro gukahuutwa, bhakiikara. Na Petero woosi akaaza kwiikara gati yaabhu.
22.56: No obhweero bhwo omuriro guyo bhukamumurika, no omuhokya wumwe omuukya, akamurora kwo okumumogorera akabhuga, “Omuutu wuno, ahaabha hamwe neewe.”
22.57: Nawe Petero akaanga, akabhuga, “Omukari wuno! Nitamumenyiri.”
22.58: Kwiibhaga isuuhu ego, omuutu owuundi akamurora Petero akamubhuurira, “Awe ni wumwe waabhu.” Kyaamwe Petero akamukyoora, “Awe mura! Ntari enye.”
22.59: Niho eriibhaga irebhe rikahita, omuutu owuundi akamukumiirirya, “Kwe eheene, omuutu wuno ahaabha hamwe nawe, ewe woosi ni Mugariraaya!”
22.60: Kyaamwe Petero akabhuga, “Mura, nitagamenyiri gayo okugaamba!” Hano yaari akyagaamba gayo, niho ekorokoome ekagaamba.
22.61: Hayo hayo Omukuru Yeesu akamwiikibhukira, akamutaangaarira Petero. Petero akagahiita amangʼana garya Yeesu yaari amubhuuriiri, “Reero, ekorokoome ekyaari kugaamba, orabha omariri kunianga katatu koosi.”
22.62: Kyaamwe akahuruka igutu, akabha ararira kwo obhururu bhukongʼu. Abhariibhi bharamunyaakya Yeesu (Mataayo 26:67-68; Mariko 14:65)
22.63: Kyaamwe abhasubhe bharya bhaari bharamugwaata Yeesu, bhakabha bharamuzibhura, no okumutema bhukongʼu.
22.64: Bhakamukuundikirya mumeeso, bharamubhuurya, “Ruusya obhurooti! Ni weewi wuno akutemiri?”
22.65: Bhakageenderera kumuruusirya amangʼana maaru ga amatuki. Yeesu arazoongerwa embere ya abhakuru (Mataayo 26:59-66; Mariko 14:55-64; Yohana 18:19-24)
22.66: Hano kwakiiri, abhakaruka bha Abhayahudi, abhakuru bha abhaseengeri na abheegya bhe emigiro bhakakora ekiina. Yeesu akareetwa embere yaabhu, bhakamubhuurya,
22.67: “Eraabhe awe naawe Masiya, otubhuurire.” Yeesu akabhakyoora, “Naangabhabhuurira, mutakwiikirirya.
22.69: Kweemera bhoono, muraandora enye Omwaana wo Omuutu, ndabha niikeeri orubhaara rwo obhuryo rwa Taatabhugya wa amanaga.”
22.70: Bhoosi bhakamubhuurya Yeesu, “Heene awe ni Mwaana wa Taatabhugya?” Yeesu akabhakyoora, “Ndora abheene mugaambiri kubha enye niwe.”
22.71: Niho abhakuru bhayo bhakabhuga, “Bhoono tutakweenda obhumenyeekererya obhuundi, kwo okubha etwe twoosi twiigwiiri engʼana yino!”

23.1: Kyaamwe, abhakuru bhoosi bha Abhayahudi bhakiimeerera, bhakamuhira Yeesu ku Pirato.
23.2: Bhakataanga okumuzoongera kwo obhuhaari, bhakabhuga, “Omuutu wuno, tumubhweeni arabhatubhuuzikania abhaatu bhe ekyaaro kyeetu kwo okubha, arabharekya abhaatu kubha bhatariha eriigooti kweeki ku Kaisari. Na arabhuga kubha ewe niwe Masiya, omutemi.”
23.3: Niho, Pirato akamubhuurya Yeesu, “Awe naawe omutemi wa Abhayahudi?” Yeesu akamukyoora, “Naawe ogaambiri.”
23.4: Niho kweeki, Pirato akabhabhuurira abhakuru bha abhaseengeri bhayo, hamwe ne eriihizo rya abhaatu, “Omuutu wuno, niruuzi atana isarya riyo ryoosi rirya.”
23.5: Abhaatu bhayo, bhakagaamba kwo okukumiirirya, “Ndora arasiigirirya abhaatu bha mukyaaro kyoosi kya Yudea. Akataanga okweegya eyo Gariraaya, na akanyaragania tee hano.”
23.6: Hano Pirato akiigwa gayo, akabhuurya, “Omuutu wuno ni Mugariraaya?”
23.7: Na hano yamenyiri kubha ewe ni Mugariraaya wa mubhukaangati bhwa Herode, akamutuma kweewe, kwo okubha eziisiku ziyo, Herode ahaabha Yerusaremu hayo. Herode aramubhuurya Yeesu
23.8: Niigo Herode akarora Yeesu, akazomererwa bhukongʼu, kwo okubha aheenda amurore kuziisiku nzaru. Omweene yaari yiigwiiri amangʼana gaaye, akeenda kurora Yeesu akukora ekitiika.
23.9: Herode akamubhuurya Yeesu kwa amabhuuryo maaru, nawe Yeesu ataamukyooriri ngʼana.
23.10: Abhakuru bha abhaseengeri na abheegya bhe emigiro, bhakahita embere bhakataanga kuzoongera Yeesu kwo obhuhaari.
23.11: Herode na abhasirikare bhaaye bhakataanga kumuzibhura, bhakamuseka, bhakamwiibhohya emyeenda emizomu. Kyaamwe bhakamukyoorya ku Pirato.
23.12: Na kweema orusiku ruyo, Herode na Pirato bhakiigwaana bhakabha abhasaani, yiingabha ekare hayo bhaari ni bhabhisa. Pirato ariikirirya Yeesu yiitwe (Mataayo 27:15-26; Mariko 15:6-15; Yohana 18:39–19:16)
23.13: Kyaamwe, Pirato akabhakumania abhakuru bha abhaseengeri, abhakaangati bha Abhayahudi, hamwe na abhaatu bha mumugye.
23.14: Akabhabhuurira, “Mundeeteeri omuutu wuno murabhuga arasiigirirya abhaatu. Mumenye kubha nimariri kumubhuurya embere weenyu. Na kwa amasemo geenyu goosi, ritariho isarya riyo ryoosi rino niruuzi kweewe.
23.15: Nawe Herode woosi, ataaruuzi kino asarirye, nikyo amukyoorirye kweetwe. Mumenyeekereerye kisi kubha, omuutu wuno ataakoriri ngʼana yino eraagirye yiitwe!
23.16: Kweego ndabhabhuurira abhasirikare bhamuteme eziityaanya, kumara nimuhaatire.” [
23.17: Pirato wuyo, eriibhaga rye Enyaangi yo Okuhiita, yaari ereenderwa abhiigurire omubhohwa wumwe kurwa mukibhoho.]
23.18: Abhaatu bhayo bhoosi bhakakora ekituri hamwe bharabhuga, “Oturuusiryeho omuutu wuyo, otwiigurire Baraaba!”
23.19: Baraaba wuyo, ahaabha abhohirwe mukibhoho, kwo okukora obhwaangi bhuno bhwatuukiri mumugye no obhwiiti.
23.20: Pirato akagaambana na abhaatu bhayo rwa kabhiri kweeki, kwo okubha akeenda amuhaatire Yeesu.
23.21: Kyaamwe, ebho bhakeenderera kukora ekituri, “Mumubhaambe, mumubhaambe kumusaraba!”
23.22: Kweeki akagaambana nabho rwa katatu, “Akoriri isaryaki rino rigirirye abhaambwe kumusaraba? Ndora etariho engʼana yino niruuzi kweewe yino eraagirye yiitwe! Kweego ndabhabhuurira bhamuteme eziityaanya, kumara nimuhaatire.”
23.23: Kyaamwe, abhaatu bhayo bhakoongera kutema ekituri bhukongʼu kubha Yeesu yiitwe kumusaraba, ne eriiraka ryaabhu rikakiraho.
23.24: Niho Pirato akiikirirya, abhaatu bhayo bhakore kyeego bhaari bhasabhiri.
23.25: Akabhiigurira omusarya wurya, wuno ahaabha abhohirwe kwo okukora obhuhakani no obhwiiti, akaragania bhamugege Yeesu bhamukorere kyeego bhakweenda. Yeesu arabhaambwa kumusaraba (Mataayo 27:32-44; Mariko 15:21-32; Yohana 19:17-27)
23.26: Hano abhasirikare bhaari bhakumuhira Yeesu kumwiita, bhakasikana no omuutu wumwe, eriina ryaaye Simooni wa mumugye gwa Kirene. Simooni wuyo, yaari arareka mumuguundu. Niho bhakamugwaata kwa nguru, bhakamuseserya omusaraba. Akabha aramurwa Yeesu kwiinyuma.
23.27: Abhaatu bhaaru bhahaamutuniirira Yeesu, gati yaabhu abhakari bhaari bharamuririra kwe ebhigoongi.
23.28: Yeesu akabhiikibhukira, akabhabhuurira, “Emwe abhakari bha Yerusaremu, mutaandirira enye! Nawe mwiiririre abheene na abhaana bheenyu.
23.29: Mumenye kubha, eziisiku zino zikuuza, abhaatu bharabhuga, hakiriku abhakari abhaguumba na bhano bhatakookirye!
23.31: Eraabhe gayo garaakorwe kumuti omubhisi, erabhabhwi kumuti omwoomu?”
23.32: Abhasirikare bhakabhahira Yeesu na abhaatu bhe ebhibhi bhabhiri, keembo bhagye kwiitwa hamwe.
23.33: Bhakahika ahagiro hano haabhirikiirwe Ekihaanga kyo Omutwe, niho bhakabhabhaamba Yeesu na abhaatu bhe ebhibhi bhabhiri bhayo kumisaraba, owumwe orubhaara rwaaye rwo obhuryo, no owuundi orubhaara rwo obhumosi.
23.34: Yeesu akabhuga, “Ee Taata, obhaabhire, kwo okubha gano bhakukora bhatagamenyiri.” Abhasirikare bhayo bhakatwaana eziingibho zyaaye, na bhakazitemera obhwiitoori.
23.35: Abhaatu bhakiimeerera hayo bhakiisuunza, na abhakaangati bha Abhayahudi, bhakataanga okumuseka Yeesu, bhakabhuga, “Ndora ahaabhatuurya abhaandi, bhoono araabhe niwe Masiya wuno yasorirwe na Taatabhugya, yiituurye omweene.”
23.36: Abhasirikare nabho bhakamuzibhura, bhakamwiisukira, okubha bhamuhe amaanzi amaruru go omuzabibu gari musuka.
23.37: Bhakamubhuurira, “Eraabhe heene naawe omutemi wa Abhayahudi, wiituurye omweene.”
23.38: Na iguru yaaye amakaamo gakatuurwa kurubaawa, gakaamirwe, “ Wuno ni Mutemi wa Abhayahudi .”
23.39: Kubhakori bhe ebhibhi bhabhiri bhayo, owumwe akamutuka Yeesu arabhuga, “Awe naawe Masiya? Bhoono ituurya omweene, otutuurye na neetwe.”
23.40: Kyaamwe, omusarya omurikyaaye akamurekya, akabhuga, “Awe otakumwoobhoha Taatabhugya yiingabha hasuuhu? Ekiina kino tutiniirwe, nikyo woosi araatinirwe.
23.41: Etwe tutiniirwe kwo obhuheene bhwe ebhisigo bhyeetu, nawe wuno atana isarya rino akoriri.”
23.42: Kyaamwe, akabhuga, “Ee Yeesu! Onihiite na neenye hano oraasikire mubhutemi bhwaazo.”
23.43: Yeesu akamukyoora, “Ndakubhuurira obhuheene, reero yino turabha hamwe mwiisaaro.” Okukwa kwa Yeesu (Mataayo 27:45-56; Mariko 15:33-41; Yohana 19:28-30)
23.44: Eriibhaga ryaari rya kasaasabha mumwiisi, ekiirima kikasikira mukyaaro kyoosi tee eriibhaga rya keenda,
23.45: kwo okubha eryoobha rikarima. No omweenda guno gwaari gusuungirwe mu Hahoreeru he eriiseengerero, gukaraanduka mbaara ibhiri.
23.46: Yeesu akarira kwiiraka ikuru, “Ee Taata, ndatuura ekoro yaane mumabhoko gaazo.”
23.47: Na hano yamariri kugaamba gayo akatina ekoro. Omukuru wa abhasirikare hano yaruuzi gayo, akamukumya Taatabhugya arabhuga, “Nimenyiri omuutu wuno yaari omuheene.”
23.48: Abhaatu bhoosi bhano bhaari bhiikumanirye hayo kurora ekisigo kiyo, hano bhaaruuzi gayo bhakakyoora mumigye gyaabhu, bhariitematema mubhikubha bhyaabhu kwe ebhigoongi.
23.49: Na abhaandi bhano bhaamumenyiri Yeesu, bhakiikara kure no okwiisuunza gano gaari kukorwa. Gati waabhu, abhakari bhaari bharimu bhano bhakumutuniirira kurwa Gariraaya. Yusufu wa Arimataya aramubhiika Yeesu (Mataayo 27:57-61; Mariko 15:42-47; Yohana 19:38-42)
23.50: -51 Hahaabha no omuutu wumwe, eriina ryaaye Yusufu, wa mumugye gwa Arimataya wa mukyaaro kya Yudea. Yusufu wuyo, ahaabha wumwe gati wa abhakuru bha Abhayahudi, nawe atiikirirenie na abharikyaaye kwe ekiina kyo okumwiita Yeesu. Ewe yaari omuutu omuzomu no omuheene, na ahaabha araganya obhutemi bhwa Taatabhugya bhuuze.
23.52: Niho Yusufu wuyo, akagya ku Pirato akamusabha ekituundu kya Yeesu.
23.53: Na hano Pirato akiikirirya, Yusufu akagya akiikya ekituundu okurwa kumusaraba, akakiriizirira mumweenda gwo obhuguri bhukuru. Kyaamwe akakihiindirya mumbiihira yino yabhaazirwe kwiitare, na mumbiihira muyo, ataariho omuutu owuundi wuno yabhiikirwemu.
23.54: Orusiku ruyo, rukabha orusiku rwo okubhanura no orusiku rwo okumuunya, na runo rwaari haguhi kuhika.
23.55: Abhakari bhano bhaageendiri hamwe na Yeesu kurwa Gariraaya bhakaaza na Yusufu. Bhakamutuniirira bhakarora mumbiihira muyo, na kyeego ekituundu kya Yeesu kihiindirwemu.
23.56: Kyaamwe, bhakakyoora yiika, bhakabhanura amaguta no omuruumbaaso, bhaaze nabhyo kuhaka kukituundu kya Yeesu. Kyaamwe orusiku rwo okumuunya, kyeego emigiro gyaari kweenda.

24.1: Etabhoori zuri orusiku rwo okutaanga rwo obhutuuro, abhakari bhayo bhakagya mumbiihira na amaguta go omuruumbaaso gano bhaari bhagabhanwiiri.
24.2: Hano bhaahikiri, bhakabhona eriigina eriikuru rino ryaari riribhiri mumbiihira, rihuungwiirwe embarika.
24.3: Niho bhakasikira muusi, kyaamwe bhakabhona ekituundu kyo Omukuru Yeesu kitarimu.
24.4: Hano bhaari bhakyaruguura iguru ye engʼana yiyo, kituukiro embarika waabhu, bhakiimeerera abhaatu bhabhiri, bhiibhohiri emyeenda gyo okumesyamesya.
24.5: Hano bharuuzi gayo, abhakari bhayo bhakagwaatwa no obhwoobha bhwaaru, niho bhakiihiinya tee haasi. Kyaamwe, abhaatu bhayo bhakabhabhuurira, “Ndora muramoohya omuhoru mubhaku?
24.6: Atari hano, aryookiri! Emwe mutakuhiita amangʼana garya yabhabhuuriiri, hano yaari akyaari Gariraaya?
24.7: Akabhuga, ‘Enye Omwaana wo Omuutu, nireenderwa nituurwe mumabhoko ga bhe ebhibhi, na bharaniitira kumusaraba, no orusiku rwa katatu ndaryooka.’ ”
24.8: Neebho bhakahiita amangʼana gayo ga Yeesu,
24.9: bhakarwa mumbiihira bhakagya kukeerenia na abheega bha Yeesu ikumi na wumwe, hamwe na abhaatu abhaandi bhoosi.
24.10: Abhakari bhayo ni Mariamu wa mumugye gwa Magidara, Yoana, na Mariamu nina waabhu Yaakobo, hamwe na abhakari abhaandi bhano bhaari hamwe nabho.
24.11: Hano bhaagaambiri goosi gayo kubheega, bhakagarora kubha ni ga kizabhuri, bhataagiikiriirye.
24.12: Nawe, Petero akiimeerera, akaryaara bhwaangu kugya mubhubhi. Akiihiinya, akasoomya mumbiihira, akayirora engibho ndabhu yino bhaamubhiikiirimu Yeesu, giri hayo egyeene ego. Akarwa hayo, eno ariibhuurya omweene kino kituukiri. Orugeendo rwo okugya Emau (Mariko 16:12-13)
24.13: Orusiku ruyoruyo, abhabhiri bha abheega bha Yeesu bhaari murugeendo rwo okugya mumugye gwa Emau. Omugye guyo, gwaari obhweema bhwa amataambuka ebhikwe ikumi na kimwe (11,000) okurwa Yerusaremu.
24.14: Na abhabhiri bhayo, bhaari bhariibhisirya iguru ya amangʼana goosi gano gaakorirwe.
24.15: Hano bhakwiibhuurya no okukeerenia, Yeesu woosi akaaza, akageenda hamwe nabho.
24.16: Nawe bhaari bhakuundikiriibhwe ameeso gaabhu, bhatamenyiri kubha niwe.
24.17: Akabhabhuurya, “Murakeereneryaki eno murageenda?” Bhakiimeerera, eno bhariingiri eziikomo zyaabhu.
24.18: Owumwe waabhu, eriina ryaaye niwe Kiriopa, akamukyoora, “Mubhagini bhoosi bha Yerusaremu, naawe omweene ego omugini, wuno oteenda wiigwa goosi gano gakorirwe eziisiku zino!”
24.19: Yeesu akabhuurya, “Ni mangʼanaki gayo?” Bhakamukyoora, “Amangʼana ga Yeesu wa Nazareeti. Niwe yaari omurooti wo obhunagya bhwo okukora no okugaamba embere wa Taatabhugya na abhaatu bhoosi.
24.20: Kyaamwe, abhakuru bha abhaseengeri na abhakaangati bheetu, bhakamutinira ekiina kubha yiitwe, niho bhakamwiita kumusaraba.
24.21: Na ewe niwe tumwiisigiiri kubha, aratutuurya etwe Abhiiziraeri. Okutuuma gayo goosi, reero ni rusiku rwa katatu kweema gaatuukiri.
24.22: “Hamwe na gayo, gati wa abhakari bhano bhaari bhe eweetu, bhakatutakya. Reero etabhoori zuri bhakagya kumbiihira,
24.23: bhakabhona omubhiri gutari muusi muyo, bhiiziri kutubhuurira kubha bhatuukiirwe na bhamaraika bhano bhabhabhuuriiri kubha Yeesu ni muhoru.
24.24: Na abhaandi bhano bhaari hamwe na neetwe, bhakagya mubhubhi bhakabhona niigo ego kyeego abhakari bharya bhaagaambiri, nawe Yeesu bhataamuruuzi.”
24.25: Yeesu akabhabhuurira, “Emwe bhageege bhano, kwaki mutakunagya kwiikirirya, kwaki ni bhakongʼu ego kwiikirirya gano gaagaambirwe na abharooti?
24.26: Ndora Masiya akeenderwa kuhitira enyaako yoosi yiyo, Taatabhugya aramukora aguungibhwe?”
24.27: Niho, akabhagarurira amangʼana goosi gano gakaamirwe iguru waaye, kweemera ebhitabhu bhya Musa, tee ebhitabhu bhyoosi bhya abharooti.
24.28: Na hano bhaari bhariisuka mumugye muyo, Yeesu akiikora kubha akyaageenderera no orugeendo.
24.29: Niho bhakamwiisasaama bhukongʼu, “Wiikare hamwe neetwe hano! Ndora ritubhiiri ne ekiirima kiiziri.” Niho, Yeesu akasikira yiika kwiikara nabho.
24.30: Na hano bhakiikara kubhyaakurya, Yeesu akagega omukaate, akagusabhira, akagubhega, akabhaha.
24.31: Hayohayo, bhakarimurwa ameeso gaabhu, bhakamumenyeekererya kubha ni Yeesu. Kyaamwe akabhabhuraku.
24.32: Bhakiibhuurira, “Hano twaari munzira, akatukeerenerya gano gaari mu Makaamo Amahoreeru, tutasaambarukiri bhukongʼu muziikoro zeetu?”
24.33: Bhakabhuuka kwiibhaga riyoriyo, bhakakyoora Yerusaremu. Eyo bhakabhabhona abheega bha Yeesu ikumi na wumwe bhiikumeenie hamwe na abhaandi.
24.34: Abheega bhakabhabhuurira, “Ni heene, Omukuru Yeesu aryookiri, amuhwaarukiiri Simooni.”
24.35: Niho bhakazweenia abharikyaabhu gano gabhatuukiiri munzira, bhakabhabhuurira kyeego bhaamumenyiri Yeesu hano yabhegiri omukaate. Yeesu arahwaarukira abhaanabheega bhaaye (Mataayo 28:16-20; Mariko 16:14-18; Yohana 20:19-23; Amahokya ga Abheega 1:6-8)
24.36: Hano abhaanabheega bha Yeesu bhayo bhaari bhakwiibhisirya iguru ya gayo, hasuuhwiigo Yeesu omweene akiimeerera gati waabhu. Akabhabhuurira, “Omureembe gubhe neemwe.”
24.37: Bhakiitakya, bhakoobhoha bhukongʼu, kwo okubha bhakiiseega kubha bharuuzi omusaambwa.
24.38: Kyaamwe, Yeesu akabhabhuurira, “Ndora muhoobhiri bhukongʼu, na kwaki mwiitiimaatiri muziikoro zyeenyu?
24.39: Muniisuunze amabhoko gaane na amaguru gaane, niho mumenye kubha neenye. Mungwaateku, mwiirorere abheene! Omusaambwa gutana minoku na gutana maguha, nawe, kyaabhurya mukuundora enye ninabhyo bhiyo.”
24.40: Kyaamwe, akabheerekya amabhoko gaaye na amaguru gaaye.
24.41: Abheega bhaaye, bhakazomererwa bhukongʼu eno bharuguuriri, nawe bhatiikiriirye gayo ni go obhuheene. Niho, Yeesu akabhabhuurya, “Mune ebhyaakurya bhyobhyoosi hano?”
24.44: Kyaamwe akabhabhuurira, “Gano nigo garya niabhabhuuriiri eriibhaga niari hamwe na neemwe, kubha garaakorwe gano goosi gakaamirwe iguru waane mumigiro gya Musa, na mubhitabhu bhya abharooti, na mukitabhu kya Zaburi.”
24.45: Hayo, Yeesu akabhasakirya no okubhagarurira kumenya Amakaamo Amahoreeru.
24.46: Akabhabhuurira, “Ekaamirwe kubha Masiya aranyaakibhwa no orusiku rwa katatu araryooka kurwa mubhaku.
24.47: Na abhaatu bha mubhyaaro bhyoosi, kweemera hano Yerusaremu, bhareegibhwa kuriina ryaaye kubha bhate ebhibhi bhyaabhu, niho bharaabhirwe.
24.48: Emwe neemwe abhamenyeekererya bha amangʼana gayo gaatuukiri.
24.49: “Murore! Ndabhareetera emwe Ekoro Muhoreeru kyeego Taata yabharageenie, kubha mwiikare mumugye guno tee Ekoro Muhoreeru yiize abhiizurirye obhunagya kurwa mwiisaaro.” Yeesu aragegwa kugya mwiisaaro (Mariko 16:19-20; Amahokya ga Abheega 1:9-11)
24.50: Kyaamwe, Yeesu akabhakaangata abhaanabheega bhaaye, haguhi no omugye gwa Betania. Hano bhaahikiri hayo, akagorora amabhoko gaaye iguru kwo okubhatweera ebhite.
24.51: Na hano yaari arabhatweera ebhite, niho ewe akabhatiga kwo okugegwa kugya mwiisaaro.
24.52: Hayo bhakamuseengera, kyaamwe bhakakyoora Yerusaremu, eno bhazomereerwe bhukongʼu.
24.53: Neebho bhakiikara mwiiseengerero, bhakabha bharamukumya Taatabhugya.

1.1: Kubhweemero hayo, Engʼana yaari ariho. Engʼana wuyo yaari hamwe na Taatabhugya, kweeki niwe Taatabhugya.
1.2: Kubhweemero, Engʼana yaari hamwe na Taatabhugya.
1.3: Ebhigiro bhyoosi bhyaateemirwe kwo okuhitira Engʼana wuyo. Kitariho naabhe ekigiro kimwe kino kyabhuumbirwe atariho.
1.4: Engʼana wuyo yaari esimuka yo obhuhoru bhwoosi, no obhuhoru bhuyo nibhwo bhwaari bhukureeta obhweero kubhaatu bhoosi.
1.5: Obhweero bhuyo bhuhaabhaanza mukiirima, naawe ekiirima kitaanagirye kubhuhiza tee reero.
1.6: Akaaza omuutu wumwe wuno yatumirwe na Taatabhugya. Omuutu wuyo yaari arabhirikirwa Yohana.
1.7: Yohana akaaza okumenyeekererya obhweero bhuyo, okubha abhaatu bhoosi bhabhone okwiikirirya kwo okuhitira obhumenyeekererya bhwaaye.
1.8: Yohana omweene ataari obhweero bhuyo, nawe akaaza okubhumenyeekererya.
1.9: Obhweero bhwe eheene bhuyo, bhuno bhukubhaanzira omuutu wuyo woosi, bhwaari bhuraaza mukyaaro kino.
1.10: Engʼana niwe yaari mukyaaro muno, kweeki Taatabhugya yateemiri ekyaaro okuhitira kweewe. Nawe, abhaatu bha mukyaaro bhataamumenyeekereerye.
1.11: Akaaza mukyaaro kyaaye, nawe abhaatu bhaaye bhataamusuungʼaaniri.
1.12: Nawe abhaatu bhoosi bhano bhakamusuungʼaana no okumwiikirirya, bhayo akabhaha obhuturikano bhwo kubha abhaana bha Taatabhugya.
1.13: Bhayo nibho abhaana bha Taatabhugya bhatari bhiibhwiirwe kya abhaandi, kasi kwo obhuseegi bhwo omubhiri, kasi kwo obhwiigoombi bhwo omuutu, nawe Taatabhugya omweene akabhakora kubha abhaana bhaaye.
1.14: Ambe, Engʼana wuyo akabha omuutu, akiikara gati weetu. Na neetwe tukarora obhuguungo bhwaaye, obhuguungo bhwo Omwaana omweene wa Taata Taatabhugya. Yaari no orubhaango rwaaye no obhuheene bhwoosi.
1.15: Yohana akamumenyeekererya, akatiirya eriiraka ikuru akubhuga, “Wuno niwe wuno niari nikubhabhuurira, ‘Araaza omuutu wumwe inyuma waane, omukuru kukira enye, kwo okubha yaari ariho nikyaari kwiibhurwa.’ ”
1.16: Kutuukana no obhukuunaanio bhwaaye, Taatabhugya atuheeri twoosi orubhaango rwaaye, na arageenderera okutuha orubhaango kukiraho.
1.17: Okweema ekare Taatabhugya akaruusya emigiro gyaaye kwo okuhitira Musa, na bhoono aruusirye orubhaango rwaaye no obhuheene bhwaaye kwo okuhitira Yeesu Krisito.
1.18: Atariho omuutu wowoosi wuno yaanguhiri okumurora Taatabhugya. Nawe Omwaana omweene, ewe niwe Taatabhugya, kweeki ari hamwe na Taata Taatabhugya, ewe niwe amukuundukwiiri Taatabhugya. Obhumenyeekererya bhwa Yohana Omubatiizi (Mataayo 3:1-12; Mariko 1:1-8; Ruuka 3:1-18)
1.19: Orusiku rumwe, abhakaangati bha Abhayahudi bhakatuma abhaseengeri na Abharaawi okurwa Yerusaremu, bhagye ku Yohana, bhamubhuurye, “Awe naawe weewi?” Akabhamenyeekererya,
1.20: no okubhakyoora okutama kubhisa obhuheene, “Enye nitari Masiya.”
1.21: Bhakamubhuurya kweeki, “Bhoono, awe naawe weewi? Mbe, awe naawe omurooti Eriya?” Yohana akabhakyoora, “Zeyi, enye nitari Eriya.” Ebho bhakamubhuurya kweeki, “Mbe, awe niwe omurooti wuno tukumuganya okurwa ku Taatabhugya?” Yohana akabhakyoora, “Zeyi, nitari enye.”
1.22: Bhakamubhuurya kweeki, “Ambe, awe naawe weewi? Otubhuurire okubha tugye tubhabhuurire bhano bhatutumiri. Awe orabhugabhwi iguru waazo omweene?”
1.23: Yohana akabhakyoora kuriingʼaana na amangʼana gano omurooti Isaya akabhuga, “Enye ni wurya ‘omuutu wuno akubhirikira kwe eriiraka ikuru okurwa mwiitirigo: Mumukorere Omukuru eziinzira zino araahite!’ ”
1.24: Abhaatu bhano bhaatumirwe, bhaari bharwiiri ku Bhafarisayo.
1.25: Bhayo bhakamubhuurya, “Eraabhe awe otari Masiya, naabhe omurooti Eriya, naabhe omurooti wuno tukumuganya okurwa ku Taatabhugya, ni kwaki orabatiiza abhaatu?”
1.26: Yohana akabhakyoora, “Enye ndabatiiza abhaatu kwa amaanzi, nawe gati weenyu ariho omuutu wuno emwe mutamenyiri.
1.27: Wuyo niwe akuuza inyuma waane. Enye nitakungʼarira kubha omuhokya waaye naabhe okutazura eziikobha zye ebhikweera bhyaaye.”
1.28: Amangʼana goosi gayo, gakakorwa mumugye gwa Betania, orubhaara rwa ruguru rwe Ekitaaro kya Yorodaani, hano Yohana yaakubatiiza abhaatu. Yeesu ni Ngʼoondu ya Taatabhugya
1.29: Tabhoori yaho, Yohana akamurora Yeesu araaza kweewe. Akabhabhuurira abhaatu bhano bhaari bhariho hayo, “Rora, wuyo niwe Engʼoondu ya Taatabhugya. Wuno akuruusya ebhibhi bhya abhaatu bhoosi bhe ekyaaro kino!
1.30: Wuno niwe wuno niari nikubhabhuurira, ‘Araaza omuutu wumwe inyuma waane, ewe ni mukuru kukira enye, kwo okubha yaari ariho nikyaari kwiibhurwa.’
1.31: Naabhe enye nitaamumenyeekereerye kubha ni weewi, nawe niiziri okubatiiza abhaatu kwa amaanzi, okubha akuundukurwe kubhaatu bha Iziraeri.”
1.32: Niho Yohana akamenyeekererya gano yaruuzi, akabhuga, “Nikamurora Ekoro Muhoreeru ariika okurwa mwiisaaro kye ekiguuti no okwiituura iguru waaye.
1.33: Naabhe enye omweene nitaamumenyeekereerye kubha ni weewi, nawe Taatabhugya wuno akaanituma okubatiiza kwa amaanzi yaari anibhuuriiri, ‘Omuutu wuno oraamurore Ekoro Muhoreeru ariika no okwiikara iguru waaye, wuyo niwe araabatiize abhaatu kwe Ekoro Muhoreeru.’ ”
1.34: Niho Yohana akabhuga, “Enye nduuzi gayo goosi, na ndabhamenyeekererya bhoono kubha, wuyo niwe Omwaana wa Taatabhugya.” Yeesu arasora abhaanabheega bhaaye bho okutaanga
1.35: Tabhoori yaho, Yohana yaari yiimeereeri hayo kweeki, hamwe na abhabhiri bha abhaanabheega bhaaye.
1.36: Niho akamurora Yeesu arageenda haguhi nabho. Akabhabhuurira abhaanabheega bhaaye, “Rora, wuyo niwe Engʼoondu ya Taatabhugya!”
1.37: Hano abhaanabheega bhabhiri bhayo bhiigwiiri amangʼana gayo, bhakamutuniirira Yeesu.
1.38: Yeesu akiikibhuka, akarora abhaanabheega bhayo bharamutuniirira. Akabhabhuurya, “Mbe, mureendaki?” Ebho bhakamukyoora, “Ee Raabi, oriikara hayi?” Obhugazuro bhwe engʼana Raabi ni Mweegya.
1.39: Yeesu akabhuga, “Muuze muraharora.” Niho bhakamutuniirira, bhakagya hano yaari akwiikara. Hano bhaahikiri hayo, yaari eriibhaga ri ikumi engoroobha, bhakasaaga neewe kwo orusiku ruyo.
1.40: Owumwe gati wa abhaanabheega bhabhiri bhano bhakiigwa amangʼana ga Yohana no okumutuniirira Yeesu, yaari arabhirikirwa Andurea, wamwaabhu Simooni Petero.
1.41: Rugeendo rumwe akagya okumumoohya Simooni, wamwaabhu. Hano yamubhweeni, akamubhuurira, “Tumuruuzi Masiya!” Masiya, obhugazuro bhwaku ni Krisito, omuhakwa wa amaguta.
1.42: Niho Andurea akamuhira Simooni ku Yeesu. Yeesu akamumogorera Simooni, akamubhuurira, “Awe ni Simooni, omwaana wa Yohana. Nawe okweemera bhoono, eriina ryaazo rirabha ni Kefa.” Eriina riyo ku Kiyunaani ni Petero, obhugazuro bhwaku ni itare. Yeesu arasora abhaanabheega abhaandi bhabhiri
1.43: Tabhoori yaho, Yeesu akaamura kugya mukyaaro kya Gariraaya. Niho akamubhona Firipo, akamubhuurira, “Nawuuze, onituniirire.”
1.44: Firipo yaari muutu wo okurwa mumugye gwa Betisaida, hano Andurea na Petero nabho bhaari bhakurweera.
1.45: Ambe, Firipo akamubhona Natanieri, akamubhuurira, “Tumuruuzi omuutu wuno Musa yakaamiri amangʼana gaaye mukitabhu kye emigiro, kweeki na abharooti nabho bhaakaamiri amangʼana gyaaye. Eriina ryaaye ni Yeesu, omwaana wa Yusufu, okurwa Nazareeti.”
